        print(<span class="hljs-tag">&lt;<span class="hljs-name">span</span> <span class="hljs-attr">class</span>=<span class="hljs-string">"hljs-string"</span>&gt;</span>"Setting up Tinker-Atropos Trainer..."<span class="hljs-tag">&lt;/<span class="hljs-name">span</span>&gt;</span>)

<span class="hljs-tag">&lt;/<span class="hljs-name">pre</span>&gt;</span>
        <span class="hljs-tag">&lt;/<span class="hljs-name">td</span>&gt;</span>
      <span class="hljs-tag">&lt;/<span class="hljs-name">tr</span>&gt;</span>
    
      <span class="hljs-tag">&lt;<span class="hljs-name">tr</span>&gt;</span>
        <span class="hljs-tag">&lt;<span class="hljs-name">td</span> <span class="hljs-attr">class</span>=<span class="hljs-string">"docs"</span>&gt;</span>
          <span class="hljs-tag">&lt;<span class="hljs-name">div</span> <span class="hljs-attr">class</span>=<span class="hljs-string">"pilwrap"</span>&gt;</span>
  <span class="hljs-tag">&lt;<span class="hljs-name">a</span> <span class="hljs-attr">class</span>=<span class="hljs-string">"pilcrow"</span> <span class="hljs-attr">href</span>=<span class="hljs-string">"#section-5"</span> <span class="hljs-attr">id</span>=<span class="hljs-string">"section-5"</span>&gt;</span><span class="hljs-tag">&lt;/<span class="hljs-name">a</span>&gt;</span>
<span class="hljs-tag">&lt;/<span class="hljs-name">div</span>&gt;</span>
<span class="hljs-tag">&lt;<span class="hljs-name">p</span>&gt;</span>Create single ServiceClient for both training and inference<span class="hljs-tag">&lt;/<span class="hljs-name">p</span>&gt;</span>

        <span class="hljs-tag">&lt;/<span class="hljs-name">td</span>&gt;</span>
        <span class="hljs-tag">&lt;<span class="hljs-name">td</span> <span class="hljs-attr">class</span>=<span class="hljs-string">"code highlight"</span>&gt;</span>
          <span class="hljs-tag">&lt;<span class="hljs-name">pre</span> <span class="hljs-attr">class</span>=<span class="hljs-string">"python"</span>&gt;</span>        print(<span class="hljs-tag">&lt;<span class="hljs-name">span</span> <span class="hljs-attr">class</span>=<span class="hljs-string">"hljs-string"</span>&gt;</span>f"Creating ServiceClient for <span class="hljs-tag">&lt;<span class="hljs-name">span</span> <span class="hljs-attr">class</span>=<span class="hljs-string">"hljs-subst"</span>&gt;</span>{self.base_model}<span class="hljs-tag">&lt;/<span class="hljs-name">span</span>&gt;</span>..."<span class="hljs-tag">&lt;/<span class="hljs-name">span</span>&gt;</span>)
        self.service_client = tinker.ServiceClient()

        self.tokenizer = AutoTokenizer.from_pretrained(self.base_model)
        print(<span class="hljs-tag">&lt;<span class="hljs-name">span</span> <span class="hljs-attr">class</span>=<span class="hljs-string">"hljs-string"</span>&gt;</span>f"Loaded tokenizer for <span class="hljs-tag">&lt;<span class="hljs-name">span</span> <span class="hljs-attr">class</span>=<span class="hljs-string">"hljs-subst"</span>&gt;</span>{self.base_model}<span class="hljs-tag">&lt;/<span class="hljs-name">span</span>&gt;</span>"<span class="hljs-tag">&lt;/<span class="hljs-name">span</span>&gt;</span>)

<span class="hljs-tag">&lt;/<span class="hljs-name">pre</span>&gt;</span>
        <span class="hljs-tag">&lt;/<span class="hljs-name">td</span>&gt;</span>
      <span class="hljs-tag">&lt;/<span class="hljs-name">tr</span>&gt;</span>
    
      <span class="hljs-tag">&lt;<span class="hljs-name">tr</span>&gt;</span>
        <span class="hljs-tag">&lt;<span class="hljs-name">td</span> <span class="hljs-attr">class</span>=<span class="hljs-string">"docs"</span>&gt;</span>
          <span class="hljs-tag">&lt;<span class="hljs-name">div</span> <span class="hljs-attr">class</span>=<span class="hljs-string">"pilwrap"</span>&gt;</span>
  <span class="hljs-tag">&lt;<span class="hljs-name">a</span> <span class="hljs-attr">class</span>=<span class="hljs-string">"pilcrow"</span> <span class="hljs-attr">href</span>=<span class="hljs-string">"#section-6"</span> <span class="hljs-attr">id</span>=<span class="hljs-string">"section-6"</span>&gt;</span><span class="hljs-tag">&lt;/<span class="hljs-name">a</span>&gt;</span>
<span class="hljs-tag">&lt;/<span class="hljs-name">div</span>&gt;</span>
<span class="hljs-tag">&lt;<span class="hljs-name">p</span>&gt;</span>Create LoRA training client - use tinker_model if different from tokenizer<span class="hljs-tag">&lt;/<span class="hljs-name">p</span>&gt;</span>

        <span class="hljs-tag">&lt;/<span class="hljs-name">td</span>&gt;</span>
        <span class="hljs-tag">&lt;<span class="hljs-name">td</span> <span class="hljs-attr">class</span>=<span class="hljs-string">"code highlight"</span>&gt;</span>
          <span class="hljs-tag">&lt;<span class="hljs-name">pre</span> <span class="hljs-attr">class</span>=<span class="hljs-string">"python"</span>&gt;</span>        tinker_model = self.config.tinker_model
        print(<span class="hljs-tag">&lt;<span class="hljs-name">span</span> <span class="hljs-attr">class</span>=<span class="hljs-string">"hljs-string"</span>&gt;</span>f"Creating training client for <span class="hljs-tag">&lt;<span class="hljs-name">span</span> <span class="hljs-attr">class</span>=<span class="hljs-string">"hljs-subst"</span>&gt;</span>{tinker_model}<span class="hljs-tag">&lt;/<span class="hljs-name">span</span>&gt;</span>..."<span class="hljs-tag">&lt;/<span class="hljs-name">span</span>&gt;</span>)
        self.training_client = <span class="hljs-tag">&lt;<span class="hljs-name">span</span> <span class="hljs-attr">class</span>=<span class="hljs-string">"hljs-keyword"</span>&gt;</span>await<span class="hljs-tag">&lt;/<span class="hljs-name">span</span>&gt;</span> self.service_client.create_lora_training_client_async(
            base_model=tinker_model,
            rank=self.lora_rank,
        )
        print(<span class="hljs-tag">&lt;<span class="hljs-name">span</span> <span class="hljs-attr">class</span>=<span class="hljs-string">"hljs-string"</span>&gt;</span>"Training client created"<span class="hljs-tag">&lt;/<span class="hljs-name">span</span>&gt;</span>)

<span class="hljs-tag">&lt;/<span class="hljs-name">pre</span>&gt;</span>
        <span class="hljs-tag">&lt;/<span class="hljs-name">td</span>&gt;</span>
      <span class="hljs-tag">&lt;/<span class="hljs-name">tr</span>&gt;</span>
    
      <span class="hljs-tag">&lt;<span class="hljs-name">tr</span>&gt;</span>
        <span class="hljs-tag">&lt;<span class="hljs-name">td</span> <span class="hljs-attr">class</span>=<span class="hljs-string">"docs"</span>&gt;</span>
          <span class="hljs-tag">&lt;<span class="hljs-name">div</span> <span class="hljs-attr">class</span>=<span class="hljs-string">"pilwrap"</span>&gt;</span>
  <span class="hljs-tag">&lt;<span class="hljs-name">a</span> <span class="hljs-attr">class</span>=<span class="hljs-string">"pilcrow"</span> <span class="hljs-attr">href</span>=<span class="hljs-string">"#section-7"</span> <span class="hljs-attr">id</span>=<span class="hljs-string">"section-7"</span>&gt;</span><span class="hljs-tag">&lt;/<span class="hljs-name">a</span>&gt;</span>
<span class="hljs-tag">&lt;/<span class="hljs-name">div</span>&gt;</span>
<span class="hljs-tag">&lt;<span class="hljs-name">p</span>&gt;</span>Save initial weights and create sampling client<span class="hljs-tag">&lt;/<span class="hljs-name">p</span>&gt;</span>

        <span class="hljs-tag">&lt;/<span class="hljs-name">td</span>&gt;</span>
        <span class="hljs-tag">&lt;<span class="hljs-name">td</span> <span class="hljs-attr">class</span>=<span class="hljs-string">"code highlight"</span>&gt;</span>
          <span class="hljs-tag">&lt;<span class="hljs-name">pre</span> <span class="hljs-attr">class</span>=<span class="hljs-string">"python"</span>&gt;</span>        print(<span class="hljs-tag">&lt;<span class="hljs-name">span</span> <span class="hljs-attr">class</span>=<span class="hljs-string">"hljs-string"</span>&gt;</span>"Saving initial weights..."<span class="hljs-tag">&lt;/<span class="hljs-name">span</span>&gt;</span>)
        initial_path = self.training_client.save_weights_for_sampler(name=<span class="hljs-tag">&lt;<span class="hljs-name">span</span> <span class="hljs-attr">class</span>=<span class="hljs-string">"hljs-string"</span>&gt;</span>"step_0"<span class="hljs-tag">&lt;/<span class="hljs-name">span</span>&gt;</span>).result().path
        self.current_sampling_client = self.service_client.create_sampling_client(
            model_path=initial_path
        )
        print(<span class="hljs-tag">&lt;<span class="hljs-name">span</span> <span class="hljs-attr">class</span>=<span class="hljs-string">"hljs-string"</span>&gt;</span>f"Initial sampling client created: <span class="hljs-tag">&lt;<span class="hljs-name">span</span> <span class="hljs-attr">class</span>=<span class="hljs-string">"hljs-subst"</span>&gt;</span>{initial_path}<span class="hljs-tag">&lt;/<span class="hljs-name">span</span>&gt;</span>"<span class="hljs-tag">&lt;/<span class="hljs-name">span</span>&gt;</span>)

        self.wandb_group = self.config.wandb_group <span class="hljs-tag">&lt;<span class="hljs-name">span</span> <span class="hljs-attr">class</span>=<span class="hljs-string">"hljs-keyword"</span>&gt;</span>or<span class="hljs-tag">&lt;/<span class="hljs-name">span</span>&gt;</span> wandb.sdk.lib.runid.generate_id()

        print(<span class="hljs-tag">&lt;<span class="hljs-name">span</span> <span class="hljs-attr">class</span>=<span class="hljs-string">"hljs-string"</span>&gt;</span>"Registering with Atropos API..."<span class="hljs-tag">&lt;/<span class="hljs-name">span</span>&gt;</span>)
        self.trainer_id = <span class="hljs-tag">&lt;<span class="hljs-name">span</span> <span class="hljs-attr">class</span>=<span class="hljs-string">"hljs-keyword"</span>&gt;</span>await<span class="hljs-tag">&lt;/<span class="hljs-name">span</span>&gt;</span> self._register_trainer()
        print(<span class="hljs-tag">&lt;<span class="hljs-name">span</span> <span class="hljs-attr">class</span>=<span class="hljs-string">"hljs-string"</span>&gt;</span>f"Registered as trainer: <span class="hljs-tag">&lt;<span class="hljs-name">span</span> <span class="hljs-attr">class</span>=<span class="hljs-string">"hljs-subst"</span>&gt;</span>{self.trainer_id}<span class="hljs-tag">&lt;/<span class="hljs-name">span</span>&gt;</span>"<span class="hljs-tag">&lt;/<span class="hljs-name">span</span>&gt;</span>)

        <span class="hljs-tag">&lt;<span class="hljs-name">span</span> <span class="hljs-attr">class</span>=<span class="hljs-string">"hljs-keyword"</span>&gt;</span>if<span class="hljs-tag">&lt;/<span class="hljs-name">span</span>&gt;</span> self.config.use_wandb:
            <span class="hljs-tag">&lt;<span class="hljs-name">span</span> <span class="hljs-attr">class</span>=<span class="hljs-string">"hljs-keyword"</span>&gt;</span>try<span class="hljs-tag">&lt;/<span class="hljs-name">span</span>&gt;</span>:
                wandb.init(
                    project=self.config.wandb_project,
                    name=<span class="hljs-tag">&lt;<span class="hljs-name">span</span> <span class="hljs-attr">class</span>=<span class="hljs-string">"hljs-string"</span>&gt;</span>f"<span class="hljs-tag">&lt;<span class="hljs-name">span</span> <span class="hljs-attr">class</span>=<span class="hljs-string">"hljs-subst"</span>&gt;</span>{self.config.wandb_run_name}<span class="hljs-tag">&lt;/<span class="hljs-name">span</span>&gt;</span>-trainer-<span class="hljs-tag">&lt;<span class="hljs-name">span</span> <span class="hljs-attr">class</span>=<span class="hljs-string">"hljs-subst"</span>&gt;</span>{self.config.wandb_run_suffix}<span class="hljs-tag">&lt;/<span class="hljs-name">span</span>&gt;</span>"<span class="hljs-tag">&lt;/<span class="hljs-name">span</span>&gt;</span>,
                    group=self.wandb_group,
                    tags=[<span class="hljs-tag">&lt;<span class="hljs-name">span</span> <span class="hljs-attr">class</span>=<span class="hljs-string">"hljs-string"</span>&gt;</span>"trainer"<span class="hljs-tag">&lt;/<span class="hljs-name">span</span>&gt;</span>],
                )
                print(<span class="hljs-tag">&lt;<span class="hljs-name">span</span> <span class="hljs-attr">class</span>=<span class="hljs-string">"hljs-string"</span>&gt;</span>f"Wandb initialized (trainer): <span class="hljs-tag">&lt;<span class="hljs-name">span</span> <span class="hljs-attr">class</span>=<span class="hljs-string">"hljs-subst"</span>&gt;</span>{wandb.run.name}<span class="hljs-tag">&lt;/<span class="hljs-name">span</span>&gt;</span> in group: <span class="hljs-tag">&lt;<span class="hljs-name">span</span> <span class="hljs-attr">class</span>=<span class="hljs-string">"hljs-subst"</span>&gt;</span>{self.wandb_group}<span class="hljs-tag">&lt;/<span class="hljs-name">span</span>&gt;</span>"<span class="hljs-tag">&lt;/<span class="hljs-name">span</span>&gt;</span>)
            <span class="hljs-tag">&lt;<span class="hljs-name">span</span> <span class="hljs-attr">class</span>=<span class="hljs-string">"hljs-keyword"</span>&gt;</span>except<span class="hljs-tag">&lt;/<span class="hljs-name">span</span>&gt;</span> Exception <span class="hljs-tag">&lt;<span class="hljs-name">span</span> <span class="hljs-attr">class</span>=<span class="hljs-string">"hljs-keyword"</span>&gt;</span>as<span class="hljs-tag">&lt;/<span class="hljs-name">span</span>&gt;</span> e:
                print(<span class="hljs-tag">&lt;<span class="hljs-name">span</span> <span class="hljs-attr">class</span>=<span class="hljs-string">"hljs-string"</span>&gt;</span>f"Error initializing wandb: <span class="hljs-tag">&lt;<span class="hljs-name">span</span> <span class="hljs-attr">class</span>=<span class="hljs-string">"hljs-subst"</span>&gt;</span>{e}<span class="hljs-tag">&lt;/<span class="hljs-name">span</span>&gt;</span>"<span class="hljs-tag">&lt;/<span class="hljs-name">span</span>&gt;</span>)
                self.config.env.use_wandb = <span class="hljs-tag">&lt;<span class="hljs-name">span</span> <span class="hljs-attr">class</span>=<span class="hljs-string">"hljs-literal"</span>&gt;</span>False<span class="hljs-tag">&lt;/<span class="hljs-name">span</span>&gt;</span>

    <span class="hljs-tag">&lt;<span class="hljs-name">span</span> <span class="hljs-attr">class</span>=<span class="hljs-string">"hljs-keyword"</span>&gt;</span>async<span class="hljs-tag">&lt;/<span class="hljs-name">span</span>&gt;</span> <span class="hljs-tag">&lt;<span class="hljs-name">span</span> <span class="hljs-attr">class</span>=<span class="hljs-string">"hljs-function"</span>&gt;</span><span class="hljs-tag">&lt;<span class="hljs-name">span</span> <span class="hljs-attr">class</span>=<span class="hljs-string">"hljs-keyword"</span>&gt;</span>def<span class="hljs-tag">&lt;/<span class="hljs-name">span</span>&gt;</span> <span class="hljs-tag">&lt;<span class="hljs-name">span</span> <span class="hljs-attr">class</span>=<span class="hljs-string">"hljs-title"</span>&gt;</span>_register_trainer<span class="hljs-tag">&lt;/<span class="hljs-name">span</span>&gt;</span><span class="hljs-tag">&lt;<span class="hljs-name">span</span> <span class="hljs-attr">class</span>=<span class="hljs-string">"hljs-params"</span>&gt;</span>(self)<span class="hljs-tag">&lt;/<span class="hljs-name">span</span>&gt;</span> -<span class="hljs-symbol">&amp;gt;</span> str:<span class="hljs-tag">&lt;/<span class="hljs-name">span</span>&gt;</span>
        <span class="hljs-tag">&lt;<span class="hljs-name">span</span> <span class="hljs-attr">class</span>=<span class="hljs-string">"hljs-string"</span>&gt;</span>"""Register this trainer with the Atropos API server."""<span class="hljs-tag">&lt;/<span class="hljs-name">span</span>&gt;</span>
        url = <span class="hljs-tag">&lt;<span class="hljs-name">span</span> <span class="hljs-attr">class</span>=<span class="hljs-string">"hljs-string"</span>&gt;</span>f"<span class="hljs-tag">&lt;<span class="hljs-name">span</span> <span class="hljs-attr">class</span>=<span class="hljs-string">"hljs-subst"</span>&gt;</span>{self.atropos_api_url}<span class="hljs-tag">&lt;/<span class="hljs-name">span</span>&gt;</span>/register"<span class="hljs-tag">&lt;/<span class="hljs-name">span</span>&gt;</span>

        payload = {
            <span class="hljs-tag">&lt;<span class="hljs-name">span</span> <span class="hljs-attr">class</span>=<span class="hljs-string">"hljs-string"</span>&gt;</span>"wandb_project"<span class="hljs-tag">&lt;/<span class="hljs-name">span</span>&gt;</span>: self.config.wandb_project,
            <span class="hljs-tag">&lt;<span class="hljs-name">span</span> <span class="hljs-attr">class</span>=<span class="hljs-string">"hljs-string"</span>&gt;</span>"wandb_group"<span class="hljs-tag">&lt;/<span class="hljs-name">span</span>&gt;</span>: self.wandb_group,
            <span class="hljs-tag">&lt;<span class="hljs-name">span</span> <span class="hljs-attr">class</span>=<span class="hljs-string">"hljs-string"</span>&gt;</span>"batch_size"<span class="hljs-tag">&lt;/<span class="hljs-name">span</span>&gt;</span>: self.config.batch_size,
            <span class="hljs-tag">&lt;<span class="hljs-name">span</span> <span class="hljs-attr">class</span>=<span class="hljs-string">"hljs-string"</span>&gt;</span>"max_token_len"<span class="hljs-tag">&lt;/<span class="hljs-name">span</span>&gt;</span>: self.config.max_token_trainer_length,
            <span class="hljs-tag">&lt;<span class="hljs-name">span</span> <span class="hljs-attr">class</span>=<span class="hljs-string">"hljs-string"</span>&gt;</span>"starting_step"<span class="hljs-tag">&lt;/<span class="hljs-name">span</span>&gt;</span>: <span class="hljs-tag">&lt;<span class="hljs-name">span</span> <span class="hljs-attr">class</span>=<span class="hljs-string">"hljs-number"</span>&gt;</span>0<span class="hljs-tag">&lt;/<span class="hljs-name">span</span>&gt;</span>,
            <span class="hljs-tag">&lt;<span class="hljs-name">span</span> <span class="hljs-attr">class</span>=<span class="hljs-string">"hljs-string"</span>&gt;</span>"checkpoint_dir"<span class="hljs-tag">&lt;/<span class="hljs-name">span</span>&gt;</span>: self.config.checkpoint_dir,
            <span class="hljs-tag">&lt;<span class="hljs-name">span</span> <span class="hljs-attr">class</span>=<span class="hljs-string">"hljs-string"</span>&gt;</span>"save_checkpoint_interval"<span class="hljs-tag">&lt;/<span class="hljs-name">span</span>&gt;</span>: self.config.save_checkpoint_interval,
            <span class="hljs-tag">&lt;<span class="hljs-name">span</span> <span class="hljs-attr">class</span>=<span class="hljs-string">"hljs-string"</span>&gt;</span>"num_steps"<span class="hljs-tag">&lt;/<span class="hljs-name">span</span>&gt;</span>: self.num_steps,
        }

        response = requests.post(url, json=payload)
        response.raise_for_status()

        result = response.json()
        <span class="hljs-tag">&lt;<span class="hljs-name">span</span> <span class="hljs-attr">class</span>=<span class="hljs-string">"hljs-keyword"</span>&gt;</span>return<span class="hljs-tag">&lt;/<span class="hljs-name">span</span>&gt;</span> result.get(<span class="hljs-tag">&lt;<span class="hljs-name">span</span> <span class="hljs-attr">class</span>=<span class="hljs-string">"hljs-string"</span>&gt;</span>"uuid"<span class="hljs-tag">&lt;/<span class="hljs-name">span</span>&gt;</span>)

<span class="hljs-tag">&lt;<span class="hljs-name">span</span> <span class="hljs-attr">class</span>=<span class="hljs-string">"hljs-meta"</span>&gt;</span>    @retry(stop=stop_after_attempt(3), wait=wait_exponential(multiplier=1, min=4, max=15))<span class="hljs-tag">&lt;/<span class="hljs-name">span</span>&gt;</span>
    <span class="hljs-tag">&lt;<span class="hljs-name">span</span> <span class="hljs-attr">class</span>=<span class="hljs-string">"hljs-function"</span>&gt;</span><span class="hljs-tag">&lt;<span class="hljs-name">span</span> <span class="hljs-attr">class</span>=<span class="hljs-string">"hljs-keyword"</span>&gt;</span>def<span class="hljs-tag">&lt;/<span class="hljs-name">span</span>&gt;</span> <span class="hljs-tag">&lt;<span class="hljs-name">span</span> <span class="hljs-attr">class</span>=<span class="hljs-string">"hljs-title"</span>&gt;</span>get_batch<span class="hljs-tag">&lt;/<span class="hljs-name">span</span>&gt;</span><span class="hljs-tag">&lt;<span class="hljs-name">span</span> <span class="hljs-attr">class</span>=<span class="hljs-string">"hljs-params"</span>&gt;</span>(self)<span class="hljs-tag">&lt;/<span class="hljs-name">span</span>&gt;</span>:<span class="hljs-tag">&lt;/<span class="hljs-name">span</span>&gt;</span>
        <span class="hljs-tag">&lt;<span class="hljs-name">span</span> <span class="hljs-attr">class</span>=<span class="hljs-string">"hljs-string"</span>&gt;</span>"""Fetch a batch of rollouts from Atropos API with retry logic."""<span class="hljs-tag">&lt;/<span class="hljs-name">span</span>&gt;</span>
        data = requests.get(<span class="hljs-tag">&lt;<span class="hljs-name">span</span> <span class="hljs-attr">class</span>=<span class="hljs-string">"hljs-string"</span>&gt;</span>f"<span class="hljs-tag">&lt;<span class="hljs-name">span</span> <span class="hljs-attr">class</span>=<span class="hljs-string">"hljs-subst"</span>&gt;</span>{self.atropos_api_url}<span class="hljs-tag">&lt;/<span class="hljs-name">span</span>&gt;</span>/batch"<span class="hljs-tag">&lt;/<span class="hljs-name">span</span>&gt;</span>, timeout=<span class="hljs-tag">&lt;<span class="hljs-name">span</span> <span class="hljs-attr">class</span>=<span class="hljs-string">"hljs-number"</span>&gt;</span>10<span class="hljs-tag">&lt;/<span class="hljs-name">span</span>&gt;</span>).json()
        <span class="hljs-tag">&lt;<span class="hljs-name">span</span> <span class="hljs-attr">class</span>=<span class="hljs-string">"hljs-keyword"</span>&gt;</span>return<span class="hljs-tag">&lt;/<span class="hljs-name">span</span>&gt;</span> data

<span class="hljs-tag">&lt;<span class="hljs-name">span</span> <span class="hljs-attr">class</span>=<span class="hljs-string">"hljs-meta"</span>&gt;</span>    @staticmethod<span class="hljs-tag">&lt;/<span class="hljs-name">span</span>&gt;</span>
    <span class="hljs-tag">&lt;<span class="hljs-name">span</span> <span class="hljs-attr">class</span>=<span class="hljs-string">"hljs-function"</span>&gt;</span><span class="hljs-tag">&lt;<span class="hljs-name">span</span> <span class="hljs-attr">class</span>=<span class="hljs-string">"hljs-keyword"</span>&gt;</span>def<span class="hljs-tag">&lt;/<span class="hljs-name">span</span>&gt;</span> <span class="hljs-tag">&lt;<span class="hljs-name">span</span> <span class="hljs-attr">class</span>=<span class="hljs-string">"hljs-title"</span>&gt;</span>_validate_distil_field<span class="hljs-tag">&lt;/<span class="hljs-name">span</span>&gt;</span><span class="hljs-tag">&lt;<span class="hljs-name">span</span> <span class="hljs-attr">class</span>=<span class="hljs-string">"hljs-params"</span>&gt;</span>(field_data, field_name: str, seq_len: int)<span class="hljs-tag">&lt;/<span class="hljs-name">span</span>&gt;</span>:<span class="hljs-tag">&lt;/<span class="hljs-name">span</span>&gt;</span>
        <span class="hljs-tag">&lt;<span class="hljs-name">span</span> <span class="hljs-attr">class</span>=<span class="hljs-string">"hljs-string"</span>&gt;</span>"""
        Validate a distillation field has shape [seq_len, K].

        The API always uses 2D (seq_len, K) to support top-K distillation
        on torchtitan. Tinker only supports K=1 since forward_backward_custom
        only provides per-token logprobs — no full vocab distribution.

        Returns a squeezed 1D array of shape [seq_len] for Tinker consumption.
        """<span class="hljs-tag">&lt;/<span class="hljs-name">span</span>&gt;</span>
        <span class="hljs-tag">&lt;<span class="hljs-name">span</span> <span class="hljs-attr">class</span>=<span class="hljs-string">"hljs-keyword"</span>&gt;</span>if<span class="hljs-tag">&lt;/<span class="hljs-name">span</span>&gt;</span> field_data <span class="hljs-tag">&lt;<span class="hljs-name">span</span> <span class="hljs-attr">class</span>=<span class="hljs-string">"hljs-keyword"</span>&gt;</span>is<span class="hljs-tag">&lt;/<span class="hljs-name">span</span>&gt;</span> <span class="hljs-tag">&lt;<span class="hljs-name">span</span> <span class="hljs-attr">class</span>=<span class="hljs-string">"hljs-literal"</span>&gt;</span>None<span class="hljs-tag">&lt;/<span class="hljs-name">span</span>&gt;</span>:
            <span class="hljs-tag">&lt;<span class="hljs-name">span</span> <span class="hljs-attr">class</span>=<span class="hljs-string">"hljs-keyword"</span>&gt;</span>return<span class="hljs-tag">&lt;/<span class="hljs-name">span</span>&gt;</span> <span class="hljs-tag">&lt;<span class="hljs-name">span</span> <span class="hljs-attr">class</span>=<span class="hljs-string">"hljs-literal"</span>&gt;</span>None<span class="hljs-tag">&lt;/<span class="hljs-name">span</span>&gt;</span>

        arr = np.array(field_data)

        <span class="hljs-tag">&lt;<span class="hljs-name">span</span> <span class="hljs-attr">class</span>=<span class="hljs-string">"hljs-keyword"</span>&gt;</span>if<span class="hljs-tag">&lt;/<span class="hljs-name">span</span>&gt;</span> arr.ndim == <span class="hljs-tag">&lt;<span class="hljs-name">span</span> <span class="hljs-attr">class</span>=<span class="hljs-string">"hljs-number"</span>&gt;</span>1<span class="hljs-tag">&lt;/<span class="hljs-name">span</span>&gt;</span>:
            <span class="hljs-tag">&lt;<span class="hljs-name">span</span> <span class="hljs-attr">class</span>=<span class="hljs-string">"hljs-keyword"</span>&gt;</span>raise<span class="hljs-tag">&lt;/<span class="hljs-name">span</span>&gt;</span> ValueError(
                <span class="hljs-tag">&lt;<span class="hljs-name">span</span> <span class="hljs-attr">class</span>=<span class="hljs-string">"hljs-string"</span>&gt;</span>f"Distillation field '<span class="hljs-tag">&lt;<span class="hljs-name">span</span> <span class="hljs-attr">class</span>=<span class="hljs-string">"hljs-subst"</span>&gt;</span>{field_name}<span class="hljs-tag">&lt;/<span class="hljs-name">span</span>&gt;</span>' has shape <span class="hljs-tag">&lt;<span class="hljs-name">span</span> <span class="hljs-attr">class</span>=<span class="hljs-string">"hljs-subst"</span>&gt;</span>{arr.shape}<span class="hljs-tag">&lt;/<span class="hljs-name">span</span>&gt;</span> (1D). "<span class="hljs-tag">&lt;/<span class="hljs-name">span</span>&gt;</span>
                <span class="hljs-tag">&lt;<span class="hljs-name">span</span> <span class="hljs-attr">class</span>=<span class="hljs-string">"hljs-string"</span>&gt;</span>f"Expected 2D shape [seq_len, K]. The distillation API always "<span class="hljs-tag">&lt;/<span class="hljs-name">span</span>&gt;</span>
                <span class="hljs-tag">&lt;<span class="hljs-name">span</span> <span class="hljs-attr">class</span>=<span class="hljs-string">"hljs-string"</span>&gt;</span>f"uses [seq_len, K] format — pass K=1 for per-token distillation."<span class="hljs-tag">&lt;/<span class="hljs-name">span</span>&gt;</span>
            )
        <span class="hljs-tag">&lt;<span class="hljs-name">span</span> <span class="hljs-attr">class</span>=<span class="hljs-string">"hljs-keyword"</span>&gt;</span>if<span class="hljs-tag">&lt;/<span class="hljs-name">span</span>&gt;</span> arr.ndim != <span class="hljs-tag">&lt;<span class="hljs-name">span</span> <span class="hljs-attr">class</span>=<span class="hljs-string">"hljs-number"</span>&gt;</span>2<span class="hljs-tag">&lt;/<span class="hljs-name">span</span>&gt;</span>:
            <span class="hljs-tag">&lt;<span class="hljs-name">span</span> <span class="hljs-attr">class</span>=<span class="hljs-string">"hljs-keyword"</span>&gt;</span>raise<span class="hljs-tag">&lt;/<span class="hljs-name">span</span>&gt;</span> ValueError(
                <span class="hljs-tag">&lt;<span class="hljs-name">span</span> <span class="hljs-attr">class</span>=<span class="hljs-string">"hljs-string"</span>&gt;</span>f"Distillation field '<span class="hljs-tag">&lt;<span class="hljs-name">span</span> <span class="hljs-attr">class</span>=<span class="hljs-string">"hljs-subst"</span>&gt;</span>{field_name}<span class="hljs-tag">&lt;/<span class="hljs-name">span</span>&gt;</span>' has unexpected ndim=<span class="hljs-tag">&lt;<span class="hljs-name">span</span> <span class="hljs-attr">class</span>=<span class="hljs-string">"hljs-subst"</span>&gt;</span>{arr.ndim}<span class="hljs-tag">&lt;/<span class="hljs-name">span</span>&gt;</span>, "<span class="hljs-tag">&lt;/<span class="hljs-name">span</span>&gt;</span>
                <span class="hljs-tag">&lt;<span class="hljs-name">span</span> <span class="hljs-attr">class</span>=<span class="hljs-string">"hljs-string"</span>&gt;</span>f"shape=<span class="hljs-tag">&lt;<span class="hljs-name">span</span> <span class="hljs-attr">class</span>=<span class="hljs-string">"hljs-subst"</span>&gt;</span>{arr.shape}<span class="hljs-tag">&lt;/<span class="hljs-name">span</span>&gt;</span>. Expected 2D shape [seq_len, K]."<span class="hljs-tag">&lt;/<span class="hljs-name">span</span>&gt;</span>
            )
        <span class="hljs-tag">&lt;<span class="hljs-name">span</span> <span class="hljs-attr">class</span>=<span class="hljs-string">"hljs-keyword"</span>&gt;</span>if<span class="hljs-tag">&lt;/<span class="hljs-name">span</span>&gt;</span> arr.shape[<span class="hljs-tag">&lt;<span class="hljs-name">span</span> <span class="hljs-attr">class</span>=<span class="hljs-string">"hljs-number"</span>&gt;</span>0<span class="hljs-tag">&lt;/<span class="hljs-name">span</span>&gt;</span>] != seq_len:
            <span class="hljs-tag">&lt;<span class="hljs-name">span</span> <span class="hljs-attr">class</span>=<span class="hljs-string">"hljs-keyword"</span>&gt;</span>raise<span class="hljs-tag">&lt;/<span class="hljs-name">span</span>&gt;</span> ValueError(
                <span class="hljs-tag">&lt;<span class="hljs-name">span</span> <span class="hljs-attr">class</span>=<span class="hljs-string">"hljs-string"</span>&gt;</span>f"Distillation field '<span class="hljs-tag">&lt;<span class="hljs-name">span</span> <span class="hljs-attr">class</span>=<span class="hljs-string">"hljs-subst"</span>&gt;</span>{field_name}<span class="hljs-tag">&lt;/<span class="hljs-name">span</span>&gt;</span>' has <span class="hljs-tag">&lt;<span class="hljs-name">span</span> <span class="hljs-attr">class</span>=<span class="hljs-string">"hljs-subst"</span>&gt;</span>{arr.shape[<span class="hljs-tag">&lt;<span class="hljs-name">span</span> <span class="hljs-attr">class</span>=<span class="hljs-string">"hljs-number"</span>&gt;</span>0<span class="hljs-tag">&lt;/<span class="hljs-name">span</span>&gt;</span>]}<span class="hljs-tag">&lt;/<span class="hljs-name">span</span>&gt;</span> positions "<span class="hljs-tag">&lt;/<span class="hljs-name">span</span>&gt;</span>
                <span class="hljs-tag">&lt;<span class="hljs-name">span</span> <span class="hljs-attr">class</span>=<span class="hljs-string">"hljs-string"</span>&gt;</span>f"but expected <span class="hljs-tag">&lt;<span class="hljs-name">span</span> <span class="hljs-attr">class</span>=<span class="hljs-string">"hljs-subst"</span>&gt;</span>{seq_len}<span class="hljs-tag">&lt;/<span class="hljs-name">span</span>&gt;</span> (seq_len)."<span class="hljs-tag">&lt;/<span class="hljs-name">span</span>&gt;</span>
            )
        <span class="hljs-tag">&lt;<span class="hljs-name">span</span> <span class="hljs-attr">class</span>=<span class="hljs-string">"hljs-keyword"</span>&gt;</span>if<span class="hljs-tag">&lt;/<span class="hljs-name">span</span>&gt;</span> arr.shape[<span class="hljs-tag">&lt;<span class="hljs-name">span</span> <span class="hljs-attr">class</span>=<span class="hljs-string">"hljs-number"</span>&gt;</span>1<span class="hljs-tag">&lt;/<span class="hljs-name">span</span>&gt;</span>] != <span class="hljs-tag">&lt;<span class="hljs-name">span</span> <span class="hljs-attr">class</span>=<span class="hljs-string">"hljs-number"</span>&gt;</span>1<span class="hljs-tag">&lt;/<span class="hljs-name">span</span>&gt;</span>:
            <span class="hljs-tag">&lt;<span class="hljs-name">span</span> <span class="hljs-attr">class</span>=<span class="hljs-string">"hljs-keyword"</span>&gt;</span>raise<span class="hljs-tag">&lt;/<span class="hljs-name">span</span>&gt;</span> ValueError(
                <span class="hljs-tag">&lt;<span class="hljs-name">span</span> <span class="hljs-attr">class</span>=<span class="hljs-string">"hljs-string"</span>&gt;</span>f"Distillation field '<span class="hljs-tag">&lt;<span class="hljs-name">span</span> <span class="hljs-attr">class</span>=<span class="hljs-string">"hljs-subst"</span>&gt;</span>{field_name}<span class="hljs-tag">&lt;/<span class="hljs-name">span</span>&gt;</span>' has K=<span class="hljs-tag">&lt;<span class="hljs-name">span</span> <span class="hljs-attr">class</span>=<span class="hljs-string">"hljs-subst"</span>&gt;</span>{arr.shape[<span class="hljs-tag">&lt;<span class="hljs-name">span</span> <span class="hljs-attr">class</span>=<span class="hljs-string">"hljs-number"</span>&gt;</span>1<span class="hljs-tag">&lt;/<span class="hljs-name">span</span>&gt;</span>]}<span class="hljs-tag">&lt;/<span class="hljs-name">span</span>&gt;</span> (shape <span class="hljs-tag">&lt;<span class="hljs-name">span</span> <span class="hljs-attr">class</span>=<span class="hljs-string">"hljs-subst"</span>&gt;</span>{arr.shape}<span class="hljs-tag">&lt;/<span class="hljs-name">span</span>&gt;</span>). "<span class="hljs-tag">&lt;/<span class="hljs-name">span</span>&gt;</span>
                <span class="hljs-tag">&lt;<span class="hljs-name">span</span> <span class="hljs-attr">class</span>=<span class="hljs-string">"hljs-string"</span>&gt;</span>f"Tinker only supports K=1 — its forward_backward_custom only provides "<span class="hljs-tag">&lt;/<span class="hljs-name">span</span>&gt;</span>
                <span class="hljs-tag">&lt;<span class="hljs-name">span</span> <span class="hljs-attr">class</span>=<span class="hljs-string">"hljs-string"</span>&gt;</span>f"per-token logprobs, not full vocab distribution. "<span class="hljs-tag">&lt;/<span class="hljs-name">span</span>&gt;</span>
                <span class="hljs-tag">&lt;<span class="hljs-name">span</span> <span class="hljs-attr">class</span>=<span class="hljs-string">"hljs-string"</span>&gt;</span>f"Use torchtitan for top-K distillation (K<span class="hljs-symbol">&amp;gt;</span>1)."<span class="hljs-tag">&lt;/<span class="hljs-name">span</span>&gt;</span>
            )

<span class="hljs-tag">&lt;/<span class="hljs-name">pre</span>&gt;</span>
        <span class="hljs-tag">&lt;/<span class="hljs-name">td</span>&gt;</span>
      <span class="hljs-tag">&lt;/<span class="hljs-name">tr</span>&gt;</span>
    
      <span class="hljs-tag">&lt;<span class="hljs-name">tr</span>&gt;</span>
        <span class="hljs-tag">&lt;<span class="hljs-name">td</span> <span class="hljs-attr">class</span>=<span class="hljs-string">"docs"</span>&gt;</span>
          <span class="hljs-tag">&lt;<span class="hljs-name">div</span> <span class="hljs-attr">class</span>=<span class="hljs-string">"pilwrap"</span>&gt;</span>
  <span class="hljs-tag">&lt;<span class="hljs-name">a</span> <span class="hljs-attr">class</span>=<span class="hljs-string">"pilcrow"</span> <span class="hljs-attr">href</span>=<span class="hljs-string">"#section-8"</span> <span class="hljs-attr">id</span>=<span class="hljs-string">"section-8"</span>&gt;</span><span class="hljs-tag">&lt;/<span class="hljs-name">a</span>&gt;</span>
<span class="hljs-tag">&lt;/<span class="hljs-name">div</span>&gt;</span>
<span class="hljs-tag">&lt;<span class="hljs-name">p</span>&gt;</span>Squeeze to 1D for Tinker's per-token loss functions<span class="hljs-tag">&lt;/<span class="hljs-name">p</span>&gt;</span>

        <span class="hljs-tag">&lt;/<span class="hljs-name">td</span>&gt;</span>
        <span class="hljs-tag">&lt;<span class="hljs-name">td</span> <span class="hljs-attr">class</span>=<span class="hljs-string">"code highlight"</span>&gt;</span>
          <span class="hljs-tag">&lt;<span class="hljs-name">pre</span> <span class="hljs-attr">class</span>=<span class="hljs-string">"python"</span>&gt;</span>        <span class="hljs-tag">&lt;<span class="hljs-name">span</span> <span class="hljs-attr">class</span>=<span class="hljs-string">"hljs-keyword"</span>&gt;</span>return<span class="hljs-tag">&lt;/<span class="hljs-name">span</span>&gt;</span> arr.squeeze(axis=<span class="hljs-tag">&lt;<span class="hljs-name">span</span> <span class="hljs-attr">class</span>=<span class="hljs-string">"hljs-number"</span>&gt;</span>1<span class="hljs-tag">&lt;/<span class="hljs-name">span</span>&gt;</span>)

    <span class="hljs-tag">&lt;<span class="hljs-name">span</span> <span class="hljs-attr">class</span>=<span class="hljs-string">"hljs-function"</span>&gt;</span><span class="hljs-tag">&lt;<span class="hljs-name">span</span> <span class="hljs-attr">class</span>=<span class="hljs-string">"hljs-keyword"</span>&gt;</span>def<span class="hljs-tag">&lt;/<span class="hljs-name">span</span>&gt;</span> <span class="hljs-tag">&lt;<span class="hljs-name">span</span> <span class="hljs-attr">class</span>=<span class="hljs-string">"hljs-title"</span>&gt;</span>pad_data_to_good_offset<span class="hljs-tag">&lt;/<span class="hljs-name">span</span>&gt;</span><span class="hljs-tag">&lt;<span class="hljs-name">span</span> <span class="hljs-attr">class</span>=<span class="hljs-string">"hljs-params"</span>&gt;</span>(
        self, data: Dict[str, Any]
    )<span class="hljs-tag">&lt;/<span class="hljs-name">span</span>&gt;</span> -<span class="hljs-symbol">&amp;gt;</span> tuple[List[tinker.Datum], List[float], bool]:<span class="hljs-tag">&lt;/<span class="hljs-name">span</span>&gt;</span>
        <span class="hljs-tag">&lt;<span class="hljs-name">span</span> <span class="hljs-attr">class</span>=<span class="hljs-string">"hljs-string"</span>&gt;</span>"""
        Convert Atropos batch into Tinker Datums for training.

        Pads logprobs and advantages to align with token sequences:
        - Prompt tokens get 0.0 for logprobs and advantages (no gradient)
        - Generated tokens get actual logprobs and advantages

        When distillation data is present, per-token advantages are overwritten
        with (logp_teacher - logp_student) for on-policy distillation.
        Reference: https://thinkingmachines.ai/blog/on-policy-distillation/

        Returns:
            datums: List of Tinker Datum objects for training
            group_mean_rewards: Mean reward per group
            has_distil_data: Whether distillation data was present

        Distillation fields (optional, in each batch item):
            distill_token_ids: Teacher token IDs, shape [n_trajectories][seq_len][K].
                K=1 for Tinker (per-token only). K<span class="hljs-symbol">&amp;gt;</span>1 errors here — use torchtitan.
            distill_logprobs: Teacher log-probabilities, shape [n_trajectories][seq_len][K].
                Same K constraint as distill_token_ids.
        """<span class="hljs-tag">&lt;/<span class="hljs-name">span</span>&gt;</span>
        batch = data[<span class="hljs-tag">&lt;<span class="hljs-name">span</span> <span class="hljs-attr">class</span>=<span class="hljs-string">"hljs-string"</span>&gt;</span>"batch"<span class="hljs-tag">&lt;/<span class="hljs-name">span</span>&gt;</span>]

        datums = []
        group_mean_rewards = []
        all_reference_logprobs = []
        all_advantages = []
        has_distil_data = <span class="hljs-tag">&lt;<span class="hljs-name">span</span> <span class="hljs-attr">class</span>=<span class="hljs-string">"hljs-literal"</span>&gt;</span>False<span class="hljs-tag">&lt;/<span class="hljs-name">span</span>&gt;</span>
        skipped_count = <span class="hljs-tag">&lt;<span class="hljs-name">span</span> <span class="hljs-attr">class</span>=<span class="hljs-string">"hljs-number"</span>&gt;</span>0<span class="hljs-tag">&lt;/<span class="hljs-name">span</span>&gt;</span>
<span class="hljs-tag">&lt;/<span class="hljs-name">pre</span>&gt;</span>
        <span class="hljs-tag">&lt;/<span class="hljs-name">td</span>&gt;</span>
      <span class="hljs-tag">&lt;/<span class="hljs-name">tr</span>&gt;</span>
    
      <span class="hljs-tag">&lt;<span class="hljs-name">tr</span>&gt;</span>
        <span class="hljs-tag">&lt;<span class="hljs-name">td</span> <span class="hljs-attr">class</span>=<span class="hljs-string">"docs"</span>&gt;</span>
          <span class="hljs-tag">&lt;<span class="hljs-name">div</span> <span class="hljs-attr">class</span>=<span class="hljs-string">"pilwrap"</span>&gt;</span>
  <span class="hljs-tag">&lt;<span class="hljs-name">a</span> <span class="hljs-attr">class</span>=<span class="hljs-string">"pilcrow"</span> <span class="hljs-attr">href</span>=<span class="hljs-string">"#section-9"</span> <span class="hljs-attr">id</span>=<span class="hljs-string">"section-9"</span>&gt;</span><span class="hljs-tag">&lt;/<span class="hljs-name">a</span>&gt;</span>
<span class="hljs-tag">&lt;/<span class="hljs-name">div</span>&gt;</span>
<span class="hljs-tag">&lt;<span class="hljs-name">p</span>&gt;</span>Distil-specific tracking<span class="hljs-tag">&lt;/<span class="hljs-name">p</span>&gt;</span>

        <span class="hljs-tag">&lt;/<span class="hljs-name">td</span>&gt;</span>
        <span class="hljs-tag">&lt;<span class="hljs-name">td</span> <span class="hljs-attr">class</span>=<span class="hljs-string">"code highlight"</span>&gt;</span>
          <span class="hljs-tag">&lt;<span class="hljs-name">pre</span> <span class="hljs-attr">class</span>=<span class="hljs-string">"python"</span>&gt;</span>        all_teacher_logprobs = []
        all_student_logprobs_for_distil = []
        all_per_token_advantages = []

        <span class="hljs-tag">&lt;<span class="hljs-name">span</span> <span class="hljs-attr">class</span>=<span class="hljs-string">"hljs-keyword"</span>&gt;</span>for<span class="hljs-tag">&lt;/<span class="hljs-name">span</span>&gt;</span> item <span class="hljs-tag">&lt;<span class="hljs-name">span</span> <span class="hljs-attr">class</span>=<span class="hljs-string">"hljs-keyword"</span>&gt;</span>in<span class="hljs-tag">&lt;/<span class="hljs-name">span</span>&gt;</span> batch:
<span class="hljs-tag">&lt;/<span class="hljs-name">pre</span>&gt;</span>
        <span class="hljs-tag">&lt;/<span class="hljs-name">td</span>&gt;</span>
      <span class="hljs-tag">&lt;/<span class="hljs-name">tr</span>&gt;</span>
    
      <span class="hljs-tag">&lt;<span class="hljs-name">tr</span>&gt;</span>
        <span class="hljs-tag">&lt;<span class="hljs-name">td</span> <span class="hljs-attr">class</span>=<span class="hljs-string">"docs"</span>&gt;</span>
          <span class="hljs-tag">&lt;<span class="hljs-name">div</span> <span class="hljs-attr">class</span>=<span class="hljs-string">"pilwrap"</span>&gt;</span>
  <span class="hljs-tag">&lt;<span class="hljs-name">a</span> <span class="hljs-attr">class</span>=<span class="hljs-string">"pilcrow"</span> <span class="hljs-attr">href</span>=<span class="hljs-string">"#section-10"</span> <span class="hljs-attr">id</span>=<span class="hljs-string">"section-10"</span>&gt;</span><span class="hljs-tag">&lt;/<span class="hljs-name">a</span>&gt;</span>
<span class="hljs-tag">&lt;/<span class="hljs-name">div</span>&gt;</span>
<span class="hljs-tag">&lt;<span class="hljs-name">p</span>&gt;</span>Calculate advantages<span class="hljs-tag">&lt;/<span class="hljs-name">p</span>&gt;</span>

        <span class="hljs-tag">&lt;/<span class="hljs-name">td</span>&gt;</span>
        <span class="hljs-tag">&lt;<span class="hljs-name">td</span> <span class="hljs-attr">class</span>=<span class="hljs-string">"code highlight"</span>&gt;</span>
          <span class="hljs-tag">&lt;<span class="hljs-name">pre</span> <span class="hljs-attr">class</span>=<span class="hljs-string">"python"</span>&gt;</span>            scores = np.array(item[<span class="hljs-tag">&lt;<span class="hljs-name">span</span> <span class="hljs-attr">class</span>=<span class="hljs-string">"hljs-string"</span>&gt;</span>"scores"<span class="hljs-tag">&lt;/<span class="hljs-name">span</span>&gt;</span>])
            original_mean = np.mean(scores)
            advantages = scores - original_mean

            group_mean_rewards.append(original_mean)

<span class="hljs-tag">&lt;/<span class="hljs-name">pre</span>&gt;</span>
        <span class="hljs-tag">&lt;/<span class="hljs-name">td</span>&gt;</span>
      <span class="hljs-tag">&lt;/<span class="hljs-name">tr</span>&gt;</span>
    
      <span class="hljs-tag">&lt;<span class="hljs-name">tr</span>&gt;</span>
        <span class="hljs-tag">&lt;<span class="hljs-name">td</span> <span class="hljs-attr">class</span>=<span class="hljs-string">"docs"</span>&gt;</span>
          <span class="hljs-tag">&lt;<span class="hljs-name">div</span> <span class="hljs-attr">class</span>=<span class="hljs-string">"pilwrap"</span>&gt;</span>
  <span class="hljs-tag">&lt;<span class="hljs-name">a</span> <span class="hljs-attr">class</span>=<span class="hljs-string">"pilcrow"</span> <span class="hljs-attr">href</span>=<span class="hljs-string">"#section-11"</span> <span class="hljs-attr">id</span>=<span class="hljs-string">"section-11"</span>&gt;</span><span class="hljs-tag">&lt;/<span class="hljs-name">a</span>&gt;</span>
<span class="hljs-tag">&lt;/<span class="hljs-name">div</span>&gt;</span>
<span class="hljs-tag">&lt;<span class="hljs-name">p</span>&gt;</span>Skip groups where all advantages are zero<span class="hljs-tag">&lt;/<span class="hljs-name">p</span>&gt;</span>

        <span class="hljs-tag">&lt;/<span class="hljs-name">td</span>&gt;</span>
        <span class="hljs-tag">&lt;<span class="hljs-name">td</span> <span class="hljs-attr">class</span>=<span class="hljs-string">"code highlight"</span>&gt;</span>

                        advantages[i] = <span class="hljs-tag">&lt;<span class="hljs-name">span</span> <span class="hljs-attr">class</span>=<span class="hljs-string">"hljs-number"</span>&gt;</span>0.0<span class="hljs-tag">&lt;/<span class="hljs-name">span</span>&gt;</span>

<span class="hljs-tag">&lt;<span class="hljs-name">p</span>&gt;</span>Check for distillation data at the group level

          <span class="hljs-tag">&lt;<span class="hljs-name">pre</span> <span class="hljs-attr">class</span>=<span class="hljs-string">"python"</span>&gt;</span>            item_has_distil = (
                item.get(<span class="hljs-tag">&lt;<span class="hljs-name">span</span> <span class="hljs-attr">class</span>=<span class="hljs-string">"hljs-string"</span>&gt;</span>"distill_token_ids"<span class="hljs-tag">&lt;/<span class="hljs-name">span</span>&gt;</span>) <span class="hljs-tag">&lt;<span class="hljs-name">span</span> <span class="hljs-attr">class</span>=<span class="hljs-string">"hljs-keyword"</span>&gt;</span>is<span class="hljs-tag">&lt;/<span class="hljs-name">span</span>&gt;</span> <span class="hljs-tag">&lt;<span class="hljs-name">span</span> <span class="hljs-attr">class</span>=<span class="hljs-string">"hljs-keyword"</span>&gt;</span>not<span class="hljs-tag">&lt;/<span class="hljs-name">span</span>&gt;</span> <span class="hljs-tag">&lt;<span class="hljs-name">span</span> <span class="hljs-attr">class</span>=<span class="hljs-string">"hljs-literal"</span>&gt;</span>None<span class="hljs-tag">&lt;/<span class="hljs-name">span</span>&gt;</span>
                <span class="hljs-tag">&lt;<span class="hljs-name">span</span> <span class="hljs-attr">class</span>=<span class="hljs-string">"hljs-keyword"</span>&gt;</span>and<span class="hljs-tag">&lt;/<span class="hljs-name">span</span>&gt;</span> item.get(<span class="hljs-tag">&lt;<span class="hljs-name">span</span> <span class="hljs-attr">class</span>=<span class="hljs-string">"hljs-string"</span>&gt;</span>"distill_logprobs"<span class="hljs-tag">&lt;/<span class="hljs-name">span</span>&gt;</span>) <span class="hljs-tag">&lt;<span class="hljs-name">span</span> <span class="hljs-attr">class</span>=<span class="hljs-string">"hljs-keyword"</span>&gt;</span>is<span class="hljs-tag">&lt;/<span class="hljs-name">span</span>&gt;</span> <span class="hljs-tag">&lt;<span class="hljs-name">span</span> <span class="hljs-attr">class</span>=<span class="hljs-string">"hljs-keyword"</span>&gt;</span>not<span class="hljs-tag">&lt;/<span class="hljs-name">span</span>&gt;</span> <span class="hljs-tag">&lt;<span class="hljs-name">span</span> <span class="hljs-attr">class</span>=<span class="hljs-string">"hljs-literal"</span>&gt;</span>None<span class="hljs-tag">&lt;/<span class="hljs-name">span</span>&gt;</span>
            )
            <span class="hljs-tag">&lt;<span class="hljs-name">span</span> <span class="hljs-attr">class</span>=<span class="hljs-string">"hljs-keyword"</span>&gt;</span>if<span class="hljs-tag">&lt;/<span class="hljs-name">span</span>&gt;</span> item_has_distil:
                has_distil_data = <span class="hljs-tag">&lt;<span class="hljs-name">span</span> <span class="hljs-attr">class</span>=<span class="hljs-string">"hljs-literal"</span>&gt;</span>True<span class="hljs-tag">&lt;/<span class="hljs-name">span</span>&gt;</span>

            <span class="hljs-tag">&lt;<span class="hljs-name">span</span> <span class="hljs-attr">class</span>=<span class="hljs-string">"hljs-keyword"</span>&gt;</span>for<span class="hljs-tag">&lt;/<span class="hljs-name">span</span>&gt;</span> i <span class="hljs-tag">&lt;<span class="hljs-name">span</span> <span class="hljs-attr">class</span>=<span class="hljs-string">"hljs-keyword"</span>&gt;</span>in<span class="hljs-tag">&lt;/<span class="hljs-name">span</span>&gt;</span> range(len(item[<span class="hljs-tag">&lt;<span class="hljs-name">span</span> <span class="hljs-attr">class</span>=<span class="hljs-string">"hljs-string"</span>&gt;</span>"tokens"<span class="hljs-tag">&lt;/<span class="hljs-name">span</span>&gt;</span>])):
                tokens = item[<span class="hljs-tag">&lt;<span class="hljs-name">span</span> <span class="hljs-attr">class</span>=<span class="hljs-string">"hljs-string"</span>&gt;</span>"tokens"<span class="hljs-tag">&lt;/<span class="hljs-name">span</span>&gt;</span>][i]
                trajectory_logprobs = item[<span class="hljs-tag">&lt;<span class="hljs-name">span</span> <span class="hljs-attr">class</span>=<span class="hljs-string">"hljs-string"</span>&gt;</span>"inference_logprobs"<span class="hljs-tag">&lt;/<span class="hljs-name">span</span>&gt;</span>][i]
                advantage = advantages[i]

                all_advantages.append(advantage)

                input_tokens = tokens[:<span class="hljs-tag">&lt;<span class="hljs-name">span</span> <span class="hljs-attr">class</span>=<span class="hljs-string">"hljs-number"</span>&gt;</span>-1<span class="hljs-tag">&lt;/<span class="hljs-name">span</span>&gt;</span>]
                target_tokens = tokens[<span class="hljs-tag">&lt;<span class="hljs-name">span</span> <span class="hljs-attr">class</span>=<span class="hljs-string">"hljs-number"</span>&gt;</span>1<span class="hljs-tag">&lt;/<span class="hljs-name">span</span>&gt;</span>:]

                all_logprobs = trajectory_logprobs[<span class="hljs-tag">&lt;<span class="hljs-name">span</span> <span class="hljs-attr">class</span>=<span class="hljs-string">"hljs-number"</span>&gt;</span>1<span class="hljs-tag">&lt;/<span class="hljs-name">span</span>&gt;</span>:]  <span class="hljs-tag">&lt;<span class="hljs-name">span</span> <span class="hljs-attr">class</span>=<span class="hljs-string">"hljs-comment"</span>&gt;</span># Shift right to align with targets<span class="hljs-tag">&lt;/<span class="hljs-name">span</span>&gt;</span>

                all_advantages_padded = [<span class="hljs-tag">&lt;<span class="hljs-name">span</span> <span class="hljs-attr">class</span>=<span class="hljs-string">"hljs-number"</span>&gt;</span>0.0<span class="hljs-tag">&lt;/<span class="hljs-name">span</span>&gt;</span> <span class="hljs-tag">&lt;<span class="hljs-name">span</span> <span class="hljs-attr">class</span>=<span class="hljs-string">"hljs-keyword"</span>&gt;</span>if<span class="hljs-tag">&lt;/<span class="hljs-name">span</span>&gt;</span> lp == <span class="hljs-tag">&lt;<span class="hljs-name">span</span> <span class="hljs-attr">class</span>=<span class="hljs-string">"hljs-number"</span>&gt;</span>1.0<span class="hljs-tag">&lt;/<span class="hljs-name">span</span>&gt;</span> <span class="hljs-tag">&lt;<span class="hljs-name">span</span> <span class="hljs-attr">class</span>=<span class="hljs-string">"hljs-keyword"</span>&gt;</span>else<span class="hljs-tag">&lt;/<span class="hljs-name">span</span>&gt;</span> advantage <span class="hljs-tag">&lt;<span class="hljs-name">span</span> <span class="hljs-attr">class</span>=<span class="hljs-string">"hljs-keyword"</span>&gt;</span>for<span class="hljs-tag">&lt;/<span class="hljs-name">span</span>&gt;</span> lp <span class="hljs-tag">&lt;<span class="hljs-name">span</span> <span class="hljs-attr">class</span>=<span class="hljs-string">"hljs-keyword"</span>&gt;</span>in<span class="hljs-tag">&lt;/<span class="hljs-name">span</span>&gt;</span> all_logprobs]

                all_reference_logprobs.extend(all_logprobs)

                seq_len = len(target_tokens)

                <span class="hljs-tag">&lt;<span class="hljs-name">span</span> <span class="hljs-attr">class</span>=<span class="hljs-string">"hljs-keyword"</span>&gt;</span>assert<span class="hljs-tag">&lt;/<span class="hljs-name">span</span>&gt;</span> (
                    len(input_tokens) == seq_len == len(all_logprobs) == len(all_advantages_padded)
                ), <span class="hljs-tag">&lt;<span class="hljs-name">span</span> <span class="hljs-attr">class</span>=<span class="hljs-string">"hljs-string"</span>&gt;</span>f"Length mismatch: input=<span class="hljs-tag">&lt;<span class="hljs-name">span</span> <span class="hljs-attr">class</span>=<span class="hljs-string">"hljs-subst"</span>&gt;</span>{len(input_tokens)}<span class="hljs-tag">&lt;/<span class="hljs-name">span</span>&gt;</span>, target=<span class="hljs-tag">&lt;<span class="hljs-name">span</span> <span class="hljs-attr">class</span>=<span class="hljs-string">"hljs-subst"</span>&gt;</span>{seq_len}<span class="hljs-tag">&lt;/<span class="hljs-name">span</span>&gt;</span>, logprobs=<span class="hljs-tag">&lt;<span class="hljs-name">span</span> <span class="hljs-attr">class</span>=<span class="hljs-string">"hljs-subst"</span>&gt;</span>{len(all_logprobs)}<span class="hljs-tag">&lt;/<span class="hljs-name">span</span>&gt;</span>, advantages=<span class="hljs-tag">&lt;<span class="hljs-name">span</span> <span class="hljs-attr">class</span>=<span class="hljs-string">"hljs-subst"</span>&gt;</span>{len(all_advantages_padded)}<span class="hljs-tag">&lt;/<span class="hljs-name">span</span>&gt;</span>"<span class="hljs-tag">&lt;/<span class="hljs-name">span</span>&gt;</span>

<span class="hljs-tag">&lt;/<span class="hljs-name">pre</span>&gt;</span>

  <span class="hljs-tag">&lt;<span class="hljs-name">a</span> <span class="hljs-attr">class</span>=<span class="hljs-string">"pilcrow"</span> <span class="hljs-attr">href</span>=<span class="hljs-string">"#section-16"</span> <span class="hljs-attr">id</span>=<span class="hljs-string">"section-16"</span>&gt;</span><span class="hljs-tag">&lt;/<span class="hljs-name">a</span>&gt;</span>
<span class="hljs-tag">&lt;/<span class="hljs-name">div</span>&gt;</span>
<span class="hljs-tag">&lt;<span class="hljs-name">p</span>&gt;</span>Validate: must be 1D (per-token), not 2D (top-K)<span class="hljs-tag">&lt;/<span class="hljs-name">p</span>&gt;</span>

        <span class="hljs-tag">&lt;/<span class="hljs-name">td</span>&gt;</span>
        <span class="hljs-tag">&lt;<span class="hljs-name">td</span> <span class="hljs-attr">class</span>=<span class="hljs-string">"code highlight"</span>&gt;</span>
          <span class="hljs-tag">&lt;<span class="hljs-name">pre</span> <span class="hljs-attr">class</span>=<span class="hljs-string">"python"</span>&gt;</span>                    self._validate_distil_field(raw_distil_ids, <span class="hljs-tag">&lt;<span class="hljs-name">span</span> <span class="hljs-attr">class</span>=<span class="hljs-string">"hljs-string"</span>&gt;</span>"distil_token_ids"<span class="hljs-tag">&lt;/<span class="hljs-name">span</span>&gt;</span>, seq_len)
                    distil_lps = self._validate_distil_field(
                        raw_distil_lps, <span class="hljs-tag">&lt;<span class="hljs-name">span</span> <span class="hljs-attr">class</span>=<span class="hljs-string">"hljs-string"</span>&gt;</span>"distil_logprobs"<span class="hljs-tag">&lt;/<span class="hljs-name">span</span>&gt;</span>, seq_len
                    )

<span class="hljs-tag">&lt;/<span class="hljs-name">pre</span>&gt;</span>
        <span class="hljs-tag">&lt;/<span class="hljs-name">td</span>&gt;</span>
      <span class="hljs-tag">&lt;/<span class="hljs-name">tr</span>&gt;</span>
    
      <span class="hljs-tag">&lt;<span class="hljs-name">tr</span>&gt;</span>
        <span class="hljs-tag">&lt;<span class="hljs-name">td</span> <span class="hljs-attr">class</span>=<span class="hljs-string">"docs"</span>&gt;</span>
          <span class="hljs-tag">&lt;<span class="hljs-name">div</span> <span class="hljs-attr">class</span>=<span class="hljs-string">"pilwrap"</span>&gt;</span>
  <span class="hljs-tag">&lt;<span class="hljs-name">a</span> <span class="hljs-attr">class</span>=<span class="hljs-string">"pilcrow"</span> <span class="hljs-attr">href</span>=<span class="hljs-string">"#section-17"</span> <span class="hljs-attr">id</span>=<span class="hljs-string">"section-17"</span>&gt;</span><span class="hljs-tag">&lt;/<span class="hljs-name">a</span>&gt;</span>
<span class="hljs-tag">&lt;/<span class="hljs-name">div</span>&gt;</span>
<span class="hljs-tag">&lt;<span class="hljs-name">p</span>&gt;</span>Overwrite advantages: per-token logp_teacher - logp_student<span class="hljs-tag">&lt;/<span class="hljs-name">p</span>&gt;</span>

        <span class="hljs-tag">&lt;/<span class="hljs-name">td</span>&gt;</span>
        <span class="hljs-tag">&lt;<span class="hljs-name">td</span> <span class="hljs-attr">class</span>=<span class="hljs-string">"code highlight"</span>&gt;</span>
          <span class="hljs-tag">&lt;<span class="hljs-name">pre</span> <span class="hljs-attr">class</span>=<span class="hljs-string">"python"</span>&gt;</span>                    all_advantages_padded = [
                        <span class="hljs-tag">&lt;<span class="hljs-name">span</span> <span class="hljs-attr">class</span>=<span class="hljs-string">"hljs-number"</span>&gt;</span>0.0<span class="hljs-tag">&lt;/<span class="hljs-name">span</span>&gt;</span> <span class="hljs-tag">&lt;<span class="hljs-name">span</span> <span class="hljs-attr">class</span>=<span class="hljs-string">"hljs-keyword"</span>&gt;</span>if<span class="hljs-tag">&lt;/<span class="hljs-name">span</span>&gt;</span> lp == <span class="hljs-tag">&lt;<span class="hljs-name">span</span> <span class="hljs-attr">class</span>=<span class="hljs-string">"hljs-number"</span>&gt;</span>1.0<span class="hljs-tag">&lt;/<span class="hljs-name">span</span>&gt;</span> <span class="hljs-tag">&lt;<span class="hljs-name">span</span> <span class="hljs-attr">class</span>=<span class="hljs-string">"hljs-keyword"</span>&gt;</span>else<span class="hljs-tag">&lt;/<span class="hljs-name">span</span>&gt;</span> float(t_lp - lp)
                        <span class="hljs-tag">&lt;<span class="hljs-name">span</span> <span class="hljs-attr">class</span>=<span class="hljs-string">"hljs-keyword"</span>&gt;</span>for<span class="hljs-tag">&lt;/<span class="hljs-name">span</span>&gt;</span> lp, t_lp <span class="hljs-tag">&lt;<span class="hljs-name">span</span> <span class="hljs-attr">class</span>=<span class="hljs-string">"hljs-keyword"</span>&gt;</span>in<span class="hljs-tag">&lt;/<span class="hljs-name">span</span>&gt;</span> zip(all_logprobs, distil_lps)
                    ]

<span class="hljs-tag">&lt;/<span class="hljs-name">pre</span>&gt;</span>
        <span class="hljs-tag">&lt;/<span class="hljs-name">td</span>&gt;</span>
      <span class="hljs-tag">&lt;/<span class="hljs-name">tr</span>&gt;</span>
    
      <span class="hljs-tag">&lt;<span class="hljs-name">tr</span>&gt;</span>
        <span class="hljs-tag">&lt;<span class="hljs-name">td</span> <span class="hljs-attr">class</span>=<span class="hljs-string">"docs"</span>&gt;</span>
          <span class="hljs-tag">&lt;<span class="hljs-name">div</span> <span class="hljs-attr">class</span>=<span class="hljs-string">"pilwrap"</span>&gt;</span>
  <span class="hljs-tag">&lt;<span class="hljs-name">a</span> <span class="hljs-attr">class</span>=<span class="hljs-string">"pilcrow"</span> <span class="hljs-attr">href</span>=<span class="hljs-string">"#section-18"</span> <span class="hljs-attr">id</span>=<span class="hljs-string">"section-18"</span>&gt;</span><span class="hljs-tag">&lt;/<span class="hljs-name">a</span>&gt;</span>
<span class="hljs-tag">&lt;/<span class="hljs-name">div</span>&gt;</span>
<span class="hljs-tag">&lt;<span class="hljs-name">p</span>&gt;</span>Track distil stats (non-prompt tokens only)<span class="hljs-tag">&lt;/<span class="hljs-name">p</span>&gt;</span>

        <span class="hljs-tag">&lt;/<span class="hljs-name">td</span>&gt;</span>
        <span class="hljs-tag">&lt;<span class="hljs-name">td</span> <span class="hljs-attr">class</span>=<span class="hljs-string">"code highlight"</span>&gt;</span>
          <span class="hljs-tag">&lt;<span class="hljs-name">pre</span> <span class="hljs-attr">class</span>=<span class="hljs-string">"python"</span>&gt;</span>                    <span class="hljs-tag">&lt;<span class="hljs-name">span</span> <span class="hljs-attr">class</span>=<span class="hljs-string">"hljs-keyword"</span>&gt;</span>for<span class="hljs-tag">&lt;/<span class="hljs-name">span</span>&gt;</span> lp, t_lp, adv <span class="hljs-tag">&lt;<span class="hljs-name">span</span> <span class="hljs-attr">class</span>=<span class="hljs-string">"hljs-keyword"</span>&gt;</span>in<span class="hljs-tag">&lt;/<span class="hljs-name">span</span>&gt;</span> zip(all_logprobs, distil_lps, all_advantages_padded):
                        <span class="hljs-tag">&lt;<span class="hljs-name">span</span> <span class="hljs-attr">class</span>=<span class="hljs-string">"hljs-keyword"</span>&gt;</span>if<span class="hljs-tag">&lt;/<span class="hljs-name">span</span>&gt;</span> lp != <span class="hljs-tag">&lt;<span class="hljs-name">span</span> <span class="hljs-attr">class</span>=<span class="hljs-string">"hljs-number"</span>&gt;</span>1.0<span class="hljs-tag">&lt;/<span class="hljs-name">span</span>&gt;</span>:  <span class="hljs-tag">&lt;<span class="hljs-name">span</span> <span class="hljs-attr">class</span>=<span class="hljs-string">"hljs-comment"</span>&gt;</span># skip prompt sentinel tokens<span class="hljs-tag">&lt;/<span class="hljs-name">span</span>&gt;</span>
                            all_teacher_logprobs.append(float(t_lp))
                            all_student_logprobs_for_distil.append(float(lp))
                            all_per_token_advantages.append(adv)

                datum = tinker.Datum(
                    model_input=tinker.ModelInput.from_ints(tokens=input_tokens),
                    loss_fn_inputs={
                        <span class="hljs-tag">&lt;<span class="hljs-name">span</span> <span class="hljs-attr">class</span>=<span class="hljs-string">"hljs-string"</span>&gt;</span>"target_tokens"<span class="hljs-tag">&lt;/<span class="hljs-name">span</span>&gt;</span>: tinker.TensorData.from_torch(
                            torch.tensor(target_tokens, dtype=torch.int64)
                        ),
                        <span class="hljs-tag">&lt;<span class="hljs-name">span</span> <span class="hljs-attr">class</span>=<span class="hljs-string">"hljs-string"</span>&gt;</span>"logprobs"<span class="hljs-tag">&lt;/<span class="hljs-name">span</span>&gt;</span>: tinker.TensorData.from_torch(
                            torch.tensor(all_logprobs, dtype=torch.float32)
                        ),
                        <span class="hljs-tag">&lt;<span class="hljs-name">span</span> <span class="hljs-attr">class</span>=<span class="hljs-string">"hljs-string"</span>&gt;</span>"advantages"<span class="hljs-tag">&lt;/<span class="hljs-name">span</span>&gt;</span>: tinker.TensorData.from_torch(
                            torch.tensor(all_advantages_padded, dtype=torch.float32)
                        ),
                    },
                )
                datums.append(datum)

<span class="hljs-tag">&lt;/<span class="hljs-name">pre</span>&gt;</span>
        <span class="hljs-tag">&lt;/<span class="hljs-name">td</span>&gt;</span>
      <span class="hljs-tag">&lt;/<span class="hljs-name">tr</span>&gt;</span>
    
      <span class="hljs-tag">&lt;<span class="hljs-name">tr</span>&gt;</span>
        <span class="hljs-tag">&lt;<span class="hljs-name">td</span> <span class="hljs-attr">class</span>=<span class="hljs-string">"docs"</span>&gt;</span>
