    }


<span class="hljs-tag">&lt;<span class="hljs-name">span</span> <span class="hljs-attr">class</span>=<span class="hljs-string">"hljs-meta"</span>&gt;</span>@app.post("/v1/chat/completions", response_model=ChatCompletionResponse)<span class="hljs-tag">&lt;/<span class="hljs-name">span</span>&gt;</span>
<span class="hljs-tag">&lt;<span class="hljs-name">span</span> <span class="hljs-attr">class</span>=<span class="hljs-string">"hljs-keyword"</span>&gt;</span>async<span class="hljs-tag">&lt;/<span class="hljs-name">span</span>&gt;</span> <span class="hljs-tag">&lt;<span class="hljs-name">span</span> <span class="hljs-attr">class</span>=<span class="hljs-string">"hljs-function"</span>&gt;</span><span class="hljs-tag">&lt;<span class="hljs-name">span</span> <span class="hljs-attr">class</span>=<span class="hljs-string">"hljs-keyword"</span>&gt;</span>def<span class="hljs-tag">&lt;/<span class="hljs-name">span</span>&gt;</span> <span class="hljs-tag">&lt;<span class="hljs-name">span</span> <span class="hljs-attr">class</span>=<span class="hljs-string">"hljs-title"</span>&gt;</span>chat_completions<span class="hljs-tag">&lt;/<span class="hljs-name">span</span>&gt;</span><span class="hljs-tag">&lt;<span class="hljs-name">span</span> <span class="hljs-attr">class</span>=<span class="hljs-string">"hljs-params"</span>&gt;</span>(request: ChatCompletionRequest)<span class="hljs-tag">&lt;/<span class="hljs-name">span</span>&gt;</span>:<span class="hljs-tag">&lt;/<span class="hljs-name">span</span>&gt;</span>
    <span class="hljs-tag">&lt;<span class="hljs-name">span</span> <span class="hljs-attr">class</span>=<span class="hljs-string">"hljs-string"</span>&gt;</span>"""
    OpenAI-compatible chat completions endpoint.
    Called by inference server wrapper for chat completions.
    """<span class="hljs-tag">&lt;/<span class="hljs-name">span</span>&gt;</span>
    <span class="hljs-tag">&lt;<span class="hljs-name">span</span> <span class="hljs-attr">class</span>=<span class="hljs-string">"hljs-keyword"</span>&gt;</span>if<span class="hljs-tag">&lt;/<span class="hljs-name">span</span>&gt;</span> trainer <span class="hljs-tag">&lt;<span class="hljs-name">span</span> <span class="hljs-attr">class</span>=<span class="hljs-string">"hljs-keyword"</span>&gt;</span>is<span class="hljs-tag">&lt;/<span class="hljs-name">span</span>&gt;</span> <span class="hljs-tag">&lt;<span class="hljs-name">span</span> <span class="hljs-attr">class</span>=<span class="hljs-string">"hljs-literal"</span>&gt;</span>None<span class="hljs-tag">&lt;/<span class="hljs-name">span</span>&gt;</span>:
        <span class="hljs-tag">&lt;<span class="hljs-name">span</span> <span class="hljs-attr">class</span>=<span class="hljs-string">"hljs-keyword"</span>&gt;</span>raise<span class="hljs-tag">&lt;/<span class="hljs-name">span</span>&gt;</span> HTTPException(status_code=<span class="hljs-tag">&lt;<span class="hljs-name">span</span> <span class="hljs-attr">class</span>=<span class="hljs-string">"hljs-number"</span>&gt;</span>503<span class="hljs-tag">&lt;/<span class="hljs-name">span</span>&gt;</span>, detail=<span class="hljs-tag">&lt;<span class="hljs-name">span</span> <span class="hljs-attr">class</span>=<span class="hljs-string">"hljs-string"</span>&gt;</span>"Trainer not initialized"<span class="hljs-tag">&lt;/<span class="hljs-name">span</span>&gt;</span>)

    <span class="hljs-tag">&lt;<span class="hljs-name">span</span> <span class="hljs-attr">class</span>=<span class="hljs-string">"hljs-keyword"</span>&gt;</span>try<span class="hljs-tag">&lt;/<span class="hljs-name">span</span>&gt;</span>:
        messages_dict = [{<span class="hljs-tag">&lt;<span class="hljs-name">span</span> <span class="hljs-attr">class</span>=<span class="hljs-string">"hljs-string"</span>&gt;</span>"role"<span class="hljs-tag">&lt;/<span class="hljs-name">span</span>&gt;</span>: msg.role, <span class="hljs-tag">&lt;<span class="hljs-name">span</span> <span class="hljs-attr">class</span>=<span class="hljs-string">"hljs-string"</span>&gt;</span>"content"<span class="hljs-tag">&lt;/<span class="hljs-name">span</span>&gt;</span>: msg.content} <span class="hljs-tag">&lt;<span class="hljs-name">span</span> <span class="hljs-attr">class</span>=<span class="hljs-string">"hljs-keyword"</span>&gt;</span>for<span class="hljs-tag">&lt;/<span class="hljs-name">span</span>&gt;</span> msg <span class="hljs-tag">&lt;<span class="hljs-name">span</span> <span class="hljs-attr">class</span>=<span class="hljs-string">"hljs-keyword"</span>&gt;</span>in<span class="hljs-tag">&lt;/<span class="hljs-name">span</span>&gt;</span> request.messages]

<span class="hljs-tag">&lt;/<span class="hljs-name">pre</span>&gt;</span>
        <span class="hljs-tag">&lt;/<span class="hljs-name">td</span>&gt;</span>

          <span class="hljs-tag">&lt;<span class="hljs-name">div</span> <span class="hljs-attr">class</span>=<span class="hljs-string">"pilwrap"</span>&gt;</span>
  <span class="hljs-tag">&lt;<span class="hljs-name">a</span> <span class="hljs-attr">class</span>=<span class="hljs-string">"pilcrow"</span> <span class="hljs-attr">href</span>=<span class="hljs-string">"#section-35"</span> <span class="hljs-attr">id</span>=<span class="hljs-string">"section-35"</span>&gt;</span><span class="hljs-tag">&lt;/<span class="hljs-name">a</span>&gt;</span>
<span class="hljs-tag">&lt;/<span class="hljs-name">div</span>&gt;</span>
<span class="hljs-tag">&lt;<span class="hljs-name">p</span>&gt;</span>Apply chat template and tokenize<span class="hljs-tag">&lt;/<span class="hljs-name">p</span>&gt;</span>

        <span class="hljs-tag">&lt;/<span class="hljs-name">td</span>&gt;</span>
        <span class="hljs-tag">&lt;<span class="hljs-name">td</span> <span class="hljs-attr">class</span>=<span class="hljs-string">"code highlight"</span>&gt;</span>
          <span class="hljs-tag">&lt;<span class="hljs-name">pre</span> <span class="hljs-attr">class</span>=<span class="hljs-string">"python"</span>&gt;</span>        prompt_text = trainer.tokenizer.apply_chat_template(
            messages_dict, tokenize=<span class="hljs-tag">&lt;<span class="hljs-name">span</span> <span class="hljs-attr">class</span>=<span class="hljs-string">"hljs-literal"</span>&gt;</span>False<span class="hljs-tag">&lt;/<span class="hljs-name">span</span>&gt;</span>, add_generation_prompt=<span class="hljs-tag">&lt;<span class="hljs-name">span</span> <span class="hljs-attr">class</span>=<span class="hljs-string">"hljs-literal"</span>&gt;</span>True<span class="hljs-tag">&lt;/<span class="hljs-name">span</span>&gt;</span>
        )
        prompt_tokens = trainer.tokenizer.encode(prompt_text, add_special_tokens=<span class="hljs-tag">&lt;<span class="hljs-name">span</span> <span class="hljs-attr">class</span>=<span class="hljs-string">"hljs-literal"</span>&gt;</span>False<span class="hljs-tag">&lt;/<span class="hljs-name">span</span>&gt;</span>)
        model_input = ModelInput.from_ints(prompt_tokens)

<span class="hljs-tag">&lt;/<span class="hljs-name">pre</span>&gt;</span>
        <span class="hljs-tag">&lt;/<span class="hljs-name">td</span>&gt;</span>

  <span class="hljs-tag">&lt;<span class="hljs-name">a</span> <span class="hljs-attr">class</span>=<span class="hljs-string">"pilcrow"</span> <span class="hljs-attr">href</span>=<span class="hljs-string">"#section-36"</span> <span class="hljs-attr">id</span>=<span class="hljs-string">"section-36"</span>&gt;</span><span class="hljs-tag">&lt;/<span class="hljs-name">a</span>&gt;</span>
<span class="hljs-tag">&lt;/<span class="hljs-name">div</span>&gt;</span>
<span class="hljs-tag">&lt;<span class="hljs-name">p</span>&gt;</span>Generate using Tinker sampling client<span class="hljs-tag">&lt;/<span class="hljs-name">p</span>&gt;</span>

        <span class="hljs-tag">&lt;/<span class="hljs-name">td</span>&gt;</span>
        <span class="hljs-tag">&lt;<span class="hljs-name">td</span> <span class="hljs-attr">class</span>=<span class="hljs-string">"code highlight"</span>&gt;</span>
          <span class="hljs-tag">&lt;<span class="hljs-name">pre</span> <span class="hljs-attr">class</span>=<span class="hljs-string">"python"</span>&gt;</span>        sampling_params = SamplingParams(
            max_tokens=request.max_tokens,
            temperature=request.temperature,
            stop=request.stop <span class="hljs-tag">&lt;<span class="hljs-name">span</span> <span class="hljs-attr">class</span>=<span class="hljs-string">"hljs-keyword"</span>&gt;</span>if<span class="hljs-tag">&lt;/<span class="hljs-name">span</span>&gt;</span> request.stop <span class="hljs-tag">&lt;<span class="hljs-name">span</span> <span class="hljs-attr">class</span>=<span class="hljs-string">"hljs-keyword"</span>&gt;</span>else<span class="hljs-tag">&lt;/<span class="hljs-name">span</span>&gt;</span> [],
        )

        result = <span class="hljs-tag">&lt;<span class="hljs-name">span</span> <span class="hljs-attr">class</span>=<span class="hljs-string">"hljs-keyword"</span>&gt;</span>await<span class="hljs-tag">&lt;/<span class="hljs-name">span</span>&gt;</span> trainer.current_sampling_client.sample_async(
            prompt=model_input,
            sampling_params=sampling_params,
            num_samples=request.n,
        )

<span class="hljs-tag">&lt;/<span class="hljs-name">pre</span>&gt;</span>
        <span class="hljs-tag">&lt;/<span class="hljs-name">td</span>&gt;</span>
      <span class="hljs-tag">&lt;/<span class="hljs-name">tr</span>&gt;</span>
    
      <span class="hljs-tag">&lt;<span class="hljs-name">tr</span>&gt;</span>
        <span class="hljs-tag">&lt;<span class="hljs-name">td</span> <span class="hljs-attr">class</span>=<span class="hljs-string">"docs"</span>&gt;</span>
          <span class="hljs-tag">&lt;<span class="hljs-name">div</span> <span class="hljs-attr">class</span>=<span class="hljs-string">"pilwrap"</span>&gt;</span>
  <span class="hljs-tag">&lt;<span class="hljs-name">a</span> <span class="hljs-attr">class</span>=<span class="hljs-string">"pilcrow"</span> <span class="hljs-attr">href</span>=<span class="hljs-string">"#section-37"</span> <span class="hljs-attr">id</span>=<span class="hljs-string">"section-37"</span>&gt;</span><span class="hljs-tag">&lt;/<span class="hljs-name">a</span>&gt;</span>
<span class="hljs-tag">&lt;/<span class="hljs-name">div</span>&gt;</span>
<span class="hljs-tag">&lt;<span class="hljs-name">p</span>&gt;</span>Format as OpenAI response<span class="hljs-tag">&lt;/<span class="hljs-name">p</span>&gt;</span>

        <span class="hljs-tag">&lt;/<span class="hljs-name">td</span>&gt;</span>
        <span class="hljs-tag">&lt;<span class="hljs-name">td</span> <span class="hljs-attr">class</span>=<span class="hljs-string">"code highlight"</span>&gt;</span>
          <span class="hljs-tag">&lt;<span class="hljs-name">pre</span> <span class="hljs-attr">class</span>=<span class="hljs-string">"python"</span>&gt;</span>        choices = []
        <span class="hljs-tag">&lt;<span class="hljs-name">span</span> <span class="hljs-attr">class</span>=<span class="hljs-string">"hljs-keyword"</span>&gt;</span>for<span class="hljs-tag">&lt;/<span class="hljs-name">span</span>&gt;</span> i, sequence <span class="hljs-tag">&lt;<span class="hljs-name">span</span> <span class="hljs-attr">class</span>=<span class="hljs-string">"hljs-keyword"</span>&gt;</span>in<span class="hljs-tag">&lt;/<span class="hljs-name">span</span>&gt;</span> enumerate(result.sequences):
            output_text = trainer.tokenizer.decode(sequence.tokens, skip_special_tokens=<span class="hljs-tag">&lt;<span class="hljs-name">span</span> <span class="hljs-attr">class</span>=<span class="hljs-string">"hljs-literal"</span>&gt;</span>True<span class="hljs-tag">&lt;/<span class="hljs-name">span</span>&gt;</span>)
            choices.append(
                {
                    <span class="hljs-tag">&lt;<span class="hljs-name">span</span> <span class="hljs-attr">class</span>=<span class="hljs-string">"hljs-string"</span>&gt;</span>"message"<span class="hljs-tag">&lt;/<span class="hljs-name">span</span>&gt;</span>: {
                        <span class="hljs-tag">&lt;<span class="hljs-name">span</span> <span class="hljs-attr">class</span>=<span class="hljs-string">"hljs-string"</span>&gt;</span>"role"<span class="hljs-tag">&lt;/<span class="hljs-name">span</span>&gt;</span>: <span class="hljs-tag">&lt;<span class="hljs-name">span</span> <span class="hljs-attr">class</span>=<span class="hljs-string">"hljs-string"</span>&gt;</span>"assistant"<span class="hljs-tag">&lt;/<span class="hljs-name">span</span>&gt;</span>,
                        <span class="hljs-tag">&lt;<span class="hljs-name">span</span> <span class="hljs-attr">class</span>=<span class="hljs-string">"hljs-string"</span>&gt;</span>"content"<span class="hljs-tag">&lt;/<span class="hljs-name">span</span>&gt;</span>: output_text,
                    },
                    <span class="hljs-tag">&lt;<span class="hljs-name">span</span> <span class="hljs-attr">class</span>=<span class="hljs-string">"hljs-string"</span>&gt;</span>"index"<span class="hljs-tag">&lt;/<span class="hljs-name">span</span>&gt;</span>: i,
                    <span class="hljs-tag">&lt;<span class="hljs-name">span</span> <span class="hljs-attr">class</span>=<span class="hljs-string">"hljs-string"</span>&gt;</span>"finish_reason"<span class="hljs-tag">&lt;/<span class="hljs-name">span</span>&gt;</span>: <span class="hljs-tag">&lt;<span class="hljs-name">span</span> <span class="hljs-attr">class</span>=<span class="hljs-string">"hljs-string"</span>&gt;</span>"stop"<span class="hljs-tag">&lt;/<span class="hljs-name">span</span>&gt;</span>,
                }
            )

        <span class="hljs-tag">&lt;<span class="hljs-name">span</span> <span class="hljs-attr">class</span>=<span class="hljs-string">"hljs-keyword"</span>&gt;</span>return<span class="hljs-tag">&lt;/<span class="hljs-name">span</span>&gt;</span> ChatCompletionResponse(
            id=<span class="hljs-tag">&lt;<span class="hljs-name">span</span> <span class="hljs-attr">class</span>=<span class="hljs-string">"hljs-string"</span>&gt;</span>f"chatcmpl-<span class="hljs-tag">&lt;<span class="hljs-name">span</span> <span class="hljs-attr">class</span>=<span class="hljs-string">"hljs-subst"</span>&gt;</span>{random.randint(<span class="hljs-tag">&lt;<span class="hljs-name">span</span> <span class="hljs-attr">class</span>=<span class="hljs-string">"hljs-number"</span>&gt;</span>0<span class="hljs-tag">&lt;/<span class="hljs-name">span</span>&gt;</span>, <span class="hljs-tag">&lt;<span class="hljs-name">span</span> <span class="hljs-attr">class</span>=<span class="hljs-string">"hljs-number"</span>&gt;</span>999999<span class="hljs-tag">&lt;/<span class="hljs-name">span</span>&gt;</span>)}<span class="hljs-tag">&lt;/<span class="hljs-name">span</span>&gt;</span>"<span class="hljs-tag">&lt;/<span class="hljs-name">span</span>&gt;</span>,
            choices=choices,
            created=int(time.time()),
            model=trainer.base_model,
        )

    <span class="hljs-tag">&lt;<span class="hljs-name">span</span> <span class="hljs-attr">class</span>=<span class="hljs-string">"hljs-keyword"</span>&gt;</span>except<span class="hljs-tag">&lt;/<span class="hljs-name">span</span>&gt;</span> Exception <span class="hljs-tag">&lt;<span class="hljs-name">span</span> <span class="hljs-attr">class</span>=<span class="hljs-string">"hljs-keyword"</span>&gt;</span>as<span class="hljs-tag">&lt;/<span class="hljs-name">span</span>&gt;</span> e:
        <span class="hljs-tag">&lt;<span class="hljs-name">span</span> <span class="hljs-attr">class</span>=<span class="hljs-string">"hljs-keyword"</span>&gt;</span>raise<span class="hljs-tag">&lt;/<span class="hljs-name">span</span>&gt;</span> HTTPException(status_code=<span class="hljs-tag">&lt;<span class="hljs-name">span</span> <span class="hljs-attr">class</span>=<span class="hljs-string">"hljs-number"</span>&gt;</span>500<span class="hljs-tag">&lt;/<span class="hljs-name">span</span>&gt;</span>, detail=<span class="hljs-tag">&lt;<span class="hljs-name">span</span> <span class="hljs-attr">class</span>=<span class="hljs-string">"hljs-string"</span>&gt;</span>f"Chat completion failed: <span class="hljs-tag">&lt;<span class="hljs-name">span</span> <span class="hljs-attr">class</span>=<span class="hljs-string">"hljs-subst"</span>&gt;</span>{str(e)}<span class="hljs-tag">&lt;/<span class="hljs-name">span</span>&gt;</span>"<span class="hljs-tag">&lt;/<span class="hljs-name">span</span>&gt;</span>)


<span class="hljs-tag">&lt;<span class="hljs-name">span</span> <span class="hljs-attr">class</span>=<span class="hljs-string">"hljs-meta"</span>&gt;</span>@app.post("/generate", response_model=GenerateResponse | List[GenerateResponse])<span class="hljs-tag">&lt;/<span class="hljs-name">span</span>&gt;</span>
<span class="hljs-tag">&lt;<span class="hljs-name">span</span> <span class="hljs-attr">class</span>=<span class="hljs-string">"hljs-keyword"</span>&gt;</span>async<span class="hljs-tag">&lt;/<span class="hljs-name">span</span>&gt;</span> <span class="hljs-tag">&lt;<span class="hljs-name">span</span> <span class="hljs-attr">class</span>=<span class="hljs-string">"hljs-function"</span>&gt;</span><span class="hljs-tag">&lt;<span class="hljs-name">span</span> <span class="hljs-attr">class</span>=<span class="hljs-string">"hljs-keyword"</span>&gt;</span>def<span class="hljs-tag">&lt;/<span class="hljs-name">span</span>&gt;</span> <span class="hljs-tag">&lt;<span class="hljs-name">span</span> <span class="hljs-attr">class</span>=<span class="hljs-string">"hljs-title"</span>&gt;</span>generate<span class="hljs-tag">&lt;/<span class="hljs-name">span</span>&gt;</span><span class="hljs-tag">&lt;<span class="hljs-name">span</span> <span class="hljs-attr">class</span>=<span class="hljs-string">"hljs-params"</span>&gt;</span>(request: GenerateRequest)<span class="hljs-tag">&lt;/<span class="hljs-name">span</span>&gt;</span>:<span class="hljs-tag">&lt;/<span class="hljs-name">span</span>&gt;</span>
    <span class="hljs-tag">&lt;<span class="hljs-name">span</span> <span class="hljs-attr">class</span>=<span class="hljs-string">"hljs-string"</span>&gt;</span>"""
    /generate endpoint for ManagedServer.
    Called by ManagedServer with tokenized input_ids.
    Returns GenerateResponse for single completion (n=1) or List[GenerateResponse] for multiple (n<span class="hljs-symbol">&amp;gt;</span>1).
    """<span class="hljs-tag">&lt;/<span class="hljs-name">span</span>&gt;</span>
    <span class="hljs-tag">&lt;<span class="hljs-name">span</span> <span class="hljs-attr">class</span>=<span class="hljs-string">"hljs-keyword"</span>&gt;</span>if<span class="hljs-tag">&lt;/<span class="hljs-name">span</span>&gt;</span> trainer <span class="hljs-tag">&lt;<span class="hljs-name">span</span> <span class="hljs-attr">class</span>=<span class="hljs-string">"hljs-keyword"</span>&gt;</span>is<span class="hljs-tag">&lt;/<span class="hljs-name">span</span>&gt;</span> <span class="hljs-tag">&lt;<span class="hljs-name">span</span> <span class="hljs-attr">class</span>=<span class="hljs-string">"hljs-literal"</span>&gt;</span>None<span class="hljs-tag">&lt;/<span class="hljs-name">span</span>&gt;</span>:
        <span class="hljs-tag">&lt;<span class="hljs-name">span</span> <span class="hljs-attr">class</span>=<span class="hljs-string">"hljs-keyword"</span>&gt;</span>raise<span class="hljs-tag">&lt;/<span class="hljs-name">span</span>&gt;</span> HTTPException(status_code=<span class="hljs-tag">&lt;<span class="hljs-name">span</span> <span class="hljs-attr">class</span>=<span class="hljs-string">"hljs-number"</span>&gt;</span>503<span class="hljs-tag">&lt;/<span class="hljs-name">span</span>&gt;</span>, detail=<span class="hljs-tag">&lt;<span class="hljs-name">span</span> <span class="hljs-attr">class</span>=<span class="hljs-string">"hljs-string"</span>&gt;</span>"Trainer not initialized"<span class="hljs-tag">&lt;/<span class="hljs-name">span</span>&gt;</span>)

    <span class="hljs-tag">&lt;<span class="hljs-name">span</span> <span class="hljs-attr">class</span>=<span class="hljs-string">"hljs-keyword"</span>&gt;</span>try<span class="hljs-tag">&lt;/<span class="hljs-name">span</span>&gt;</span>:
<span class="hljs-tag">&lt;/<span class="hljs-name">pre</span>&gt;</span>
        <span class="hljs-tag">&lt;/<span class="hljs-name">td</span>&gt;</span>
      <span class="hljs-tag">&lt;/<span class="hljs-name">tr</span>&gt;</span>
    
      <span class="hljs-tag">&lt;<span class="hljs-name">tr</span>&gt;</span>
        <span class="hljs-tag">&lt;<span class="hljs-name">td</span> <span class="hljs-attr">class</span>=<span class="hljs-string">"docs"</span>&gt;</span>
          <span class="hljs-tag">&lt;<span class="hljs-name">div</span> <span class="hljs-attr">class</span>=<span class="hljs-string">"pilwrap"</span>&gt;</span>
  <span class="hljs-tag">&lt;<span class="hljs-name">a</span> <span class="hljs-attr">class</span>=<span class="hljs-string">"pilcrow"</span> <span class="hljs-attr">href</span>=<span class="hljs-string">"#section-38"</span> <span class="hljs-attr">id</span>=<span class="hljs-string">"section-38"</span>&gt;</span><span class="hljs-tag">&lt;/<span class="hljs-name">a</span>&gt;</span>
<span class="hljs-tag">&lt;/<span class="hljs-name">div</span>&gt;</span>
<span class="hljs-tag">&lt;<span class="hljs-name">p</span>&gt;</span>Extract input_ids (ManagedServer sends tokenized input)<span class="hljs-tag">&lt;/<span class="hljs-name">p</span>&gt;</span>

        <span class="hljs-tag">&lt;/<span class="hljs-name">td</span>&gt;</span>
        <span class="hljs-tag">&lt;<span class="hljs-name">td</span> <span class="hljs-attr">class</span>=<span class="hljs-string">"code highlight"</span>&gt;</span>
          <span class="hljs-tag">&lt;<span class="hljs-name">pre</span> <span class="hljs-attr">class</span>=<span class="hljs-string">"python"</span>&gt;</span>        <span class="hljs-tag">&lt;<span class="hljs-name">span</span> <span class="hljs-attr">class</span>=<span class="hljs-string">"hljs-keyword"</span>&gt;</span>if<span class="hljs-tag">&lt;/<span class="hljs-name">span</span>&gt;</span> request.input_ids <span class="hljs-tag">&lt;<span class="hljs-name">span</span> <span class="hljs-attr">class</span>=<span class="hljs-string">"hljs-keyword"</span>&gt;</span>is<span class="hljs-tag">&lt;/<span class="hljs-name">span</span>&gt;</span> <span class="hljs-tag">&lt;<span class="hljs-name">span</span> <span class="hljs-attr">class</span>=<span class="hljs-string">"hljs-literal"</span>&gt;</span>None<span class="hljs-tag">&lt;/<span class="hljs-name">span</span>&gt;</span>:
            <span class="hljs-tag">&lt;<span class="hljs-name">span</span> <span class="hljs-attr">class</span>=<span class="hljs-string">"hljs-keyword"</span>&gt;</span>raise<span class="hljs-tag">&lt;/<span class="hljs-name">span</span>&gt;</span> HTTPException(status_code=<span class="hljs-tag">&lt;<span class="hljs-name">span</span> <span class="hljs-attr">class</span>=<span class="hljs-string">"hljs-number"</span>&gt;</span>400<span class="hljs-tag">&lt;/<span class="hljs-name">span</span>&gt;</span>, detail=<span class="hljs-tag">&lt;<span class="hljs-name">span</span> <span class="hljs-attr">class</span>=<span class="hljs-string">"hljs-string"</span>&gt;</span>"input_ids is required"<span class="hljs-tag">&lt;/<span class="hljs-name">span</span>&gt;</span>)

        prompt_tokens = request.input_ids

<span class="hljs-tag">&lt;/<span class="hljs-name">pre</span>&gt;</span>
        <span class="hljs-tag">&lt;/<span class="hljs-name">td</span>&gt;</span>
      <span class="hljs-tag">&lt;/<span class="hljs-name">tr</span>&gt;</span>
    
      <span class="hljs-tag">&lt;<span class="hljs-name">tr</span>&gt;</span>
        <span class="hljs-tag">&lt;<span class="hljs-name">td</span> <span class="hljs-attr">class</span>=<span class="hljs-string">"docs"</span>&gt;</span>
          <span class="hljs-tag">&lt;<span class="hljs-name">div</span> <span class="hljs-attr">class</span>=<span class="hljs-string">"pilwrap"</span>&gt;</span>
  <span class="hljs-tag">&lt;<span class="hljs-name">a</span> <span class="hljs-attr">class</span>=<span class="hljs-string">"pilcrow"</span> <span class="hljs-attr">href</span>=<span class="hljs-string">"#section-39"</span> <span class="hljs-attr">id</span>=<span class="hljs-string">"section-39"</span>&gt;</span><span class="hljs-tag">&lt;/<span class="hljs-name">a</span>&gt;</span>
<span class="hljs-tag">&lt;/<span class="hljs-name">div</span>&gt;</span>
<span class="hljs-tag">&lt;<span class="hljs-name">p</span>&gt;</span>Extract sampling params<span class="hljs-tag">&lt;/<span class="hljs-name">p</span>&gt;</span>

        <span class="hljs-tag">&lt;/<span class="hljs-name">td</span>&gt;</span>
        <span class="hljs-tag">&lt;<span class="hljs-name">td</span> <span class="hljs-attr">class</span>=<span class="hljs-string">"code highlight"</span>&gt;</span>
          <span class="hljs-tag">&lt;<span class="hljs-name">pre</span> <span class="hljs-attr">class</span>=<span class="hljs-string">"python"</span>&gt;</span>        sampling_params = request.sampling_params <span class="hljs-tag">&lt;<span class="hljs-name">span</span> <span class="hljs-attr">class</span>=<span class="hljs-string">"hljs-keyword"</span>&gt;</span>or<span class="hljs-tag">&lt;/<span class="hljs-name">span</span>&gt;</span> {}
        n = sampling_params.get(<span class="hljs-tag">&lt;<span class="hljs-name">span</span> <span class="hljs-attr">class</span>=<span class="hljs-string">"hljs-string"</span>&gt;</span>"n"<span class="hljs-tag">&lt;/<span class="hljs-name">span</span>&gt;</span>, <span class="hljs-tag">&lt;<span class="hljs-name">span</span> <span class="hljs-attr">class</span>=<span class="hljs-string">"hljs-number"</span>&gt;</span>1<span class="hljs-tag">&lt;/<span class="hljs-name">span</span>&gt;</span>)
        max_tokens = sampling_params.get(<span class="hljs-tag">&lt;<span class="hljs-name">span</span> <span class="hljs-attr">class</span>=<span class="hljs-string">"hljs-string"</span>&gt;</span>"max_new_tokens"<span class="hljs-tag">&lt;/<span class="hljs-name">span</span>&gt;</span>, <span class="hljs-tag">&lt;<span class="hljs-name">span</span> <span class="hljs-attr">class</span>=<span class="hljs-string">"hljs-number"</span>&gt;</span>256<span class="hljs-tag">&lt;/<span class="hljs-name">span</span>&gt;</span>)
        temperature = sampling_params.get(<span class="hljs-tag">&lt;<span class="hljs-name">span</span> <span class="hljs-attr">class</span>=<span class="hljs-string">"hljs-string"</span>&gt;</span>"temperature"<span class="hljs-tag">&lt;/<span class="hljs-name">span</span>&gt;</span>, <span class="hljs-tag">&lt;<span class="hljs-name">span</span> <span class="hljs-attr">class</span>=<span class="hljs-string">"hljs-number"</span>&gt;</span>1.0<span class="hljs-tag">&lt;/<span class="hljs-name">span</span>&gt;</span>)
        stop = sampling_params.get(<span class="hljs-tag">&lt;<span class="hljs-name">span</span> <span class="hljs-attr">class</span>=<span class="hljs-string">"hljs-string"</span>&gt;</span>"stop"<span class="hljs-tag">&lt;/<span class="hljs-name">span</span>&gt;</span>, [])

<span class="hljs-tag">&lt;/<span class="hljs-name">pre</span>&gt;</span>
        <span class="hljs-tag">&lt;/<span class="hljs-name">td</span>&gt;</span>

<span class="hljs-tag">&lt;/<span class="hljs-name">div</span>&gt;</span>
<span class="hljs-tag">&lt;<span class="hljs-name">p</span>&gt;</span>Generate using Tinker sampling client<span class="hljs-tag">&lt;/<span class="hljs-name">p</span>&gt;</span>

        <span class="hljs-tag">&lt;/<span class="hljs-name">td</span>&gt;</span>
        <span class="hljs-tag">&lt;<span class="hljs-name">td</span> <span class="hljs-attr">class</span>=<span class="hljs-string">"code highlight"</span>&gt;</span>
          <span class="hljs-tag">&lt;<span class="hljs-name">pre</span> <span class="hljs-attr">class</span>=<span class="hljs-string">"python"</span>&gt;</span>        model_input = ModelInput.from_ints(prompt_tokens)
        tinker_sampling_params = SamplingParams(
            max_tokens=max_tokens,
            temperature=temperature,
            stop=stop <span class="hljs-tag">&lt;<span class="hljs-name">span</span> <span class="hljs-attr">class</span>=<span class="hljs-string">"hljs-keyword"</span>&gt;</span>if<span class="hljs-tag">&lt;/<span class="hljs-name">span</span>&gt;</span> isinstance(stop, list) <span class="hljs-tag">&lt;<span class="hljs-name">span</span> <span class="hljs-attr">class</span>=<span class="hljs-string">"hljs-keyword"</span>&gt;</span>else<span class="hljs-tag">&lt;/<span class="hljs-name">span</span>&gt;</span> [stop],
        )

        result = <span class="hljs-tag">&lt;<span class="hljs-name">span</span> <span class="hljs-attr">class</span>=<span class="hljs-string">"hljs-keyword"</span>&gt;</span>await<span class="hljs-tag">&lt;/<span class="hljs-name">span</span>&gt;</span> trainer.current_sampling_client.sample_async(
            prompt=model_input,
            sampling_params=tinker_sampling_params,
            num_samples=n,
        )

        <span class="hljs-tag">&lt;<span class="hljs-name">span</span> <span class="hljs-attr">class</span>=<span class="hljs-string">"hljs-keyword"</span>&gt;</span>if<span class="hljs-tag">&lt;/<span class="hljs-name">span</span>&gt;</span> n == <span class="hljs-tag">&lt;<span class="hljs-name">span</span> <span class="hljs-attr">class</span>=<span class="hljs-string">"hljs-number"</span>&gt;</span>1<span class="hljs-tag">&lt;/<span class="hljs-name">span</span>&gt;</span>:
            sequence = result.sequences[<span class="hljs-tag">&lt;<span class="hljs-name">span</span> <span class="hljs-attr">class</span>=<span class="hljs-string">"hljs-number"</span>&gt;</span>0<span class="hljs-tag">&lt;/<span class="hljs-name">span</span>&gt;</span>]
            output_tokens = sequence.tokens
            output_logprobs = sequence.logprobs <span class="hljs-tag">&lt;<span class="hljs-name">span</span> <span class="hljs-attr">class</span>=<span class="hljs-string">"hljs-keyword"</span>&gt;</span>if<span class="hljs-tag">&lt;/<span class="hljs-name">span</span>&gt;</span> sequence.logprobs <span class="hljs-tag">&lt;<span class="hljs-name">span</span> <span class="hljs-attr">class</span>=<span class="hljs-string">"hljs-keyword"</span>&gt;</span>else<span class="hljs-tag">&lt;/<span class="hljs-name">span</span>&gt;</span> []
            output_text = trainer.tokenizer.decode(output_tokens, skip_special_tokens=<span class="hljs-tag">&lt;<span class="hljs-name">span</span> <span class="hljs-attr">class</span>=<span class="hljs-string">"hljs-literal"</span>&gt;</span>True<span class="hljs-tag">&lt;/<span class="hljs-name">span</span>&gt;</span>)

            output_token_logprobs = []
            <span class="hljs-tag">&lt;<span class="hljs-name">span</span> <span class="hljs-attr">class</span>=<span class="hljs-string">"hljs-keyword"</span>&gt;</span>for<span class="hljs-tag">&lt;/<span class="hljs-name">span</span>&gt;</span> token_id, logprob <span class="hljs-tag">&lt;<span class="hljs-name">span</span> <span class="hljs-attr">class</span>=<span class="hljs-string">"hljs-keyword"</span>&gt;</span>in<span class="hljs-tag">&lt;/<span class="hljs-name">span</span>&gt;</span> zip(output_tokens, output_logprobs):
                token_text = trainer.tokenizer.decode([token_id])
                output_token_logprobs.append((logprob, token_id, token_text))

            <span class="hljs-tag">&lt;<span class="hljs-name">span</span> <span class="hljs-attr">class</span>=<span class="hljs-string">"hljs-keyword"</span>&gt;</span>return<span class="hljs-tag">&lt;/<span class="hljs-name">span</span>&gt;</span> GenerateResponse(
                text=output_text,
                meta_info={
                    <span class="hljs-tag">&lt;<span class="hljs-name">span</span> <span class="hljs-attr">class</span>=<span class="hljs-string">"hljs-string"</span>&gt;</span>"prompt_tokens"<span class="hljs-tag">&lt;/<span class="hljs-name">span</span>&gt;</span>: len(prompt_tokens),
                    <span class="hljs-tag">&lt;<span class="hljs-name">span</span> <span class="hljs-attr">class</span>=<span class="hljs-string">"hljs-string"</span>&gt;</span>"completion_tokens"<span class="hljs-tag">&lt;/<span class="hljs-name">span</span>&gt;</span>: len(output_tokens),
                    <span class="hljs-tag">&lt;<span class="hljs-name">span</span> <span class="hljs-attr">class</span>=<span class="hljs-string">"hljs-string"</span>&gt;</span>"finish_reason"<span class="hljs-tag">&lt;/<span class="hljs-name">span</span>&gt;</span>: <span class="hljs-tag">&lt;<span class="hljs-name">span</span> <span class="hljs-attr">class</span>=<span class="hljs-string">"hljs-string"</span>&gt;</span>"stop"<span class="hljs-tag">&lt;/<span class="hljs-name">span</span>&gt;</span>,

<span class="hljs-tag">&lt;/<span class="hljs-name">div</span>&gt;</span>
<span class="hljs-tag">&lt;<span class="hljs-name">p</span>&gt;</span>Multiple completions - return list of GenerateResponse objects<span class="hljs-tag">&lt;/<span class="hljs-name">p</span>&gt;</span>

        <span class="hljs-tag">&lt;/<span class="hljs-name">td</span>&gt;</span>

          <span class="hljs-tag">&lt;<span class="hljs-name">pre</span> <span class="hljs-attr">class</span>=<span class="hljs-string">"python"</span>&gt;</span>            results = []

                output_tokens = sequence.tokens

                output_text = trainer.tokenizer.decode(output_tokens, skip_special_tokens=<span class="hljs-tag">&lt;<span class="hljs-name">span</span> <span class="hljs-attr">class</span>=<span class="hljs-string">"hljs-literal"</span>&gt;</span>True<span class="hljs-tag">&lt;/<span class="hljs-name">span</span>&gt;</span>)

<span class="hljs-tag">&lt;/<span class="hljs-name">div</span>&gt;</span>
<span class="hljs-tag">&lt;<span class="hljs-name">p</span>&gt;</span>Format logprobs for response<span class="hljs-tag">&lt;/<span class="hljs-name">p</span>&gt;</span>

        <span class="hljs-tag">&lt;/<span class="hljs-name">td</span>&gt;</span>

          <span class="hljs-tag">&lt;<span class="hljs-name">pre</span> <span class="hljs-attr">class</span>=<span class="hljs-string">"python"</span>&gt;</span>                output_token_logprobs = []
                <span class="hljs-tag">&lt;<span class="hljs-name">span</span> <span class="hljs-attr">class</span>=<span class="hljs-string">"hljs-keyword"</span>&gt;</span>for<span class="hljs-tag">&lt;/<span class="hljs-name">span</span>&gt;</span> token_id, logprob <span class="hljs-tag">&lt;<span class="hljs-name">span</span> <span class="hljs-attr">class</span>=<span class="hljs-string">"hljs-keyword"</span>&gt;</span>in<span class="hljs-tag">&lt;/<span class="hljs-name">span</span>&gt;</span> zip(output_tokens, output_logprobs):
                    token_text = trainer.tokenizer.decode([token_id])
                    output_token_logprobs.append((logprob, token_id, token_text))

                results.append(
                    GenerateResponse(
                        text=output_text,
                        meta_info={
                            <span class="hljs-tag">&lt;<span class="hljs-name">span</span> <span class="hljs-attr">class</span>=<span class="hljs-string">"hljs-string"</span>&gt;</span>"prompt_tokens"<span class="hljs-tag">&lt;/<span class="hljs-name">span</span>&gt;</span>: len(prompt_tokens),

    <span class="hljs-tag">&lt;<span class="hljs-name">span</span> <span class="hljs-attr">class</span>=<span class="hljs-string">"hljs-keyword"</span>&gt;</span>except<span class="hljs-tag">&lt;/<span class="hljs-name">span</span>&gt;</span> Exception <span class="hljs-tag">&lt;<span class="hljs-name">span</span> <span class="hljs-attr">class</span>=<span class="hljs-string">"hljs-keyword"</span>&gt;</span>as<span class="hljs-tag">&lt;/<span class="hljs-name">span</span>&gt;</span> e:

<span class="hljs-tag">&lt;<span class="hljs-name">span</span> <span class="hljs-attr">class</span>=<span class="hljs-string">"hljs-meta"</span>&gt;</span>@app.post("/logprobs", response_model=LogprobsResponse)<span class="hljs-tag">&lt;/<span class="hljs-name">span</span>&gt;</span>
<span class="hljs-tag">&lt;<span class="hljs-name">span</span> <span class="hljs-attr">class</span>=<span class="hljs-string">"hljs-keyword"</span>&gt;</span>async<span class="hljs-tag">&lt;/<span class="hljs-name">span</span>&gt;</span> <span class="hljs-tag">&lt;<span class="hljs-name">span</span> <span class="hljs-attr">class</span>=<span class="hljs-string">"hljs-function"</span>&gt;</span><span class="hljs-tag">&lt;<span class="hljs-name">span</span> <span class="hljs-attr">class</span>=<span class="hljs-string">"hljs-keyword"</span>&gt;</span>def<span class="hljs-tag">&lt;/<span class="hljs-name">span</span>&gt;</span> <span class="hljs-tag">&lt;<span class="hljs-name">span</span> <span class="hljs-attr">class</span>=<span class="hljs-string">"hljs-title"</span>&gt;</span>logprobs<span class="hljs-tag">&lt;/<span class="hljs-name">span</span>&gt;</span><span class="hljs-tag">&lt;<span class="hljs-name">span</span> <span class="hljs-attr">class</span>=<span class="hljs-string">"hljs-params"</span>&gt;</span>(request: LogprobsRequest)<span class="hljs-tag">&lt;/<span class="hljs-name">span</span>&gt;</span>:<span class="hljs-tag">&lt;/<span class="hljs-name">span</span>&gt;</span>
    <span class="hljs-tag">&lt;<span class="hljs-name">span</span> <span class="hljs-attr">class</span>=<span class="hljs-string">"hljs-string"</span>&gt;</span>"""
    Compute per-token log probabilities for input tokens without generation.

    Accepts either raw token IDs (input_ids) or text (which gets tokenized).
    Uses the current sampling client's compute_logprobs under the hood.
    """<span class="hljs-tag">&lt;/<span class="hljs-name">span</span>&gt;</span>
    <span class="hljs-tag">&lt;<span class="hljs-name">span</span> <span class="hljs-attr">class</span>=<span class="hljs-string">"hljs-keyword"</span>&gt;</span>if<span class="hljs-tag">&lt;/<span class="hljs-name">span</span>&gt;</span> trainer <span class="hljs-tag">&lt;<span class="hljs-name">span</span> <span class="hljs-attr">class</span>=<span class="hljs-string">"hljs-keyword"</span>&gt;</span>is<span class="hljs-tag">&lt;/<span class="hljs-name">span</span>&gt;</span> <span class="hljs-tag">&lt;<span class="hljs-name">span</span> <span class="hljs-attr">class</span>=<span class="hljs-string">"hljs-literal"</span>&gt;</span>None<span class="hljs-tag">&lt;/<span class="hljs-name">span</span>&gt;</span>:
        <span class="hljs-tag">&lt;<span class="hljs-name">span</span> <span class="hljs-attr">class</span>=<span class="hljs-string">"hljs-keyword"</span>&gt;</span>raise<span class="hljs-tag">&lt;/<span class="hljs-name">span</span>&gt;</span> HTTPException(status_code=<span class="hljs-tag">&lt;<span class="hljs-name">span</span> <span class="hljs-attr">class</span>=<span class="hljs-string">"hljs-number"</span>&gt;</span>503<span class="hljs-tag">&lt;/<span class="hljs-name">span</span>&gt;</span>, detail=<span class="hljs-tag">&lt;<span class="hljs-name">span</span> <span class="hljs-attr">class</span>=<span class="hljs-string">"hljs-string"</span>&gt;</span>"Trainer not initialized"<span class="hljs-tag">&lt;/<span class="hljs-name">span</span>&gt;</span>)

    <span class="hljs-tag">&lt;<span class="hljs-name">span</span> <span class="hljs-attr">class</span>=<span class="hljs-string">"hljs-keyword"</span>&gt;</span>try<span class="hljs-tag">&lt;/<span class="hljs-name">span</span>&gt;</span>:
<span class="hljs-tag">&lt;/<span class="hljs-name">pre</span>&gt;</span>
        <span class="hljs-tag">&lt;/<span class="hljs-name">td</span>&gt;</span>
      <span class="hljs-tag">&lt;/<span class="hljs-name">tr</span>&gt;</span>
    
      <span class="hljs-tag">&lt;<span class="hljs-name">tr</span>&gt;</span>
        <span class="hljs-tag">&lt;<span class="hljs-name">td</span> <span class="hljs-attr">class</span>=<span class="hljs-string">"docs"</span>&gt;</span>
          <span class="hljs-tag">&lt;<span class="hljs-name">div</span> <span class="hljs-attr">class</span>=<span class="hljs-string">"pilwrap"</span>&gt;</span>
  <span class="hljs-tag">&lt;<span class="hljs-name">a</span> <span class="hljs-attr">class</span>=<span class="hljs-string">"pilcrow"</span> <span class="hljs-attr">href</span>=<span class="hljs-string">"#section-43"</span> <span class="hljs-attr">id</span>=<span class="hljs-string">"section-43"</span>&gt;</span><span class="hljs-tag">&lt;/<span class="hljs-name">a</span>&gt;</span>
<span class="hljs-tag">&lt;/<span class="hljs-name">div</span>&gt;</span>
<span class="hljs-tag">&lt;<span class="hljs-name">p</span>&gt;</span>Resolve token IDs<span class="hljs-tag">&lt;/<span class="hljs-name">p</span>&gt;</span>

        <span class="hljs-tag">&lt;/<span class="hljs-name">td</span>&gt;</span>
        <span class="hljs-tag">&lt;<span class="hljs-name">td</span> <span class="hljs-attr">class</span>=<span class="hljs-string">"code highlight"</span>&gt;</span>
          <span class="hljs-tag">&lt;<span class="hljs-name">pre</span> <span class="hljs-attr">class</span>=<span class="hljs-string">"python"</span>&gt;</span>        <span class="hljs-tag">&lt;<span class="hljs-name">span</span> <span class="hljs-attr">class</span>=<span class="hljs-string">"hljs-keyword"</span>&gt;</span>if<span class="hljs-tag">&lt;/<span class="hljs-name">span</span>&gt;</span> request.input_ids <span class="hljs-tag">&lt;<span class="hljs-name">span</span> <span class="hljs-attr">class</span>=<span class="hljs-string">"hljs-keyword"</span>&gt;</span>is<span class="hljs-tag">&lt;/<span class="hljs-name">span</span>&gt;</span> <span class="hljs-tag">&lt;<span class="hljs-name">span</span> <span class="hljs-attr">class</span>=<span class="hljs-string">"hljs-keyword"</span>&gt;</span>not<span class="hljs-tag">&lt;/<span class="hljs-name">span</span>&gt;</span> <span class="hljs-tag">&lt;<span class="hljs-name">span</span> <span class="hljs-attr">class</span>=<span class="hljs-string">"hljs-literal"</span>&gt;</span>None<span class="hljs-tag">&lt;/<span class="hljs-name">span</span>&gt;</span>:
            token_ids = request.input_ids
        <span class="hljs-tag">&lt;<span class="hljs-name">span</span> <span class="hljs-attr">class</span>=<span class="hljs-string">"hljs-keyword"</span>&gt;</span>elif<span class="hljs-tag">&lt;/<span class="hljs-name">span</span>&gt;</span> request.text <span class="hljs-tag">&lt;<span class="hljs-name">span</span> <span class="hljs-attr">class</span>=<span class="hljs-string">"hljs-keyword"</span>&gt;</span>is<span class="hljs-tag">&lt;/<span class="hljs-name">span</span>&gt;</span> <span class="hljs-tag">&lt;<span class="hljs-name">span</span> <span class="hljs-attr">class</span>=<span class="hljs-string">"hljs-keyword"</span>&gt;</span>not<span class="hljs-tag">&lt;/<span class="hljs-name">span</span>&gt;</span> <span class="hljs-tag">&lt;<span class="hljs-name">span</span> <span class="hljs-attr">class</span>=<span class="hljs-string">"hljs-literal"</span>&gt;</span>None<span class="hljs-tag">&lt;/<span class="hljs-name">span</span>&gt;</span>:
            token_ids = trainer.tokenizer.encode(request.text, add_special_tokens=<span class="hljs-tag">&lt;<span class="hljs-name">span</span> <span class="hljs-attr">class</span>=<span class="hljs-string">"hljs-literal"</span>&gt;</span>False<span class="hljs-tag">&lt;/<span class="hljs-name">span</span>&gt;</span>)
        <span class="hljs-tag">&lt;<span class="hljs-name">span</span> <span class="hljs-attr">class</span>=<span class="hljs-string">"hljs-keyword"</span>&gt;</span>else<span class="hljs-tag">&lt;/<span class="hljs-name">span</span>&gt;</span>:
            <span class="hljs-tag">&lt;<span class="hljs-name">span</span> <span class="hljs-attr">class</span>=<span class="hljs-string">"hljs-keyword"</span>&gt;</span>raise<span class="hljs-tag">&lt;/<span class="hljs-name">span</span>&gt;</span> HTTPException(
                status_code=<span class="hljs-tag">&lt;<span class="hljs-name">span</span> <span class="hljs-attr">class</span>=<span class="hljs-string">"hljs-number"</span>&gt;</span>400<span class="hljs-tag">&lt;/<span class="hljs-name">span</span>&gt;</span>,
                detail=<span class="hljs-tag">&lt;<span class="hljs-name">span</span> <span class="hljs-attr">class</span>=<span class="hljs-string">"hljs-string"</span>&gt;</span>"Either 'input_ids' or 'text' must be provided"<span class="hljs-tag">&lt;/<span class="hljs-name">span</span>&gt;</span>,
            )

        <span class="hljs-tag">&lt;<span class="hljs-name">span</span> <span class="hljs-attr">class</span>=<span class="hljs-string">"hljs-keyword"</span>&gt;</span>if<span class="hljs-tag">&lt;/<span class="hljs-name">span</span>&gt;</span> len(token_ids) == <span class="hljs-tag">&lt;<span class="hljs-name">span</span> <span class="hljs-attr">class</span>=<span class="hljs-string">"hljs-number"</span>&gt;</span>0<span class="hljs-tag">&lt;/<span class="hljs-name">span</span>&gt;</span>:
            <span class="hljs-tag">&lt;<span class="hljs-name">span</span> <span class="hljs-attr">class</span>=<span class="hljs-string">"hljs-keyword"</span>&gt;</span>raise<span class="hljs-tag">&lt;/<span class="hljs-name">span</span>&gt;</span> HTTPException(status_code=<span class="hljs-tag">&lt;<span class="hljs-name">span</span> <span class="hljs-attr">class</span>=<span class="hljs-string">"hljs-number"</span>&gt;</span>400<span class="hljs-tag">&lt;/<span class="hljs-name">span</span>&gt;</span>, detail=<span class="hljs-tag">&lt;<span class="hljs-name">span</span> <span class="hljs-attr">class</span>=<span class="hljs-string">"hljs-string"</span>&gt;</span>"Input must have at least one token"<span class="hljs-tag">&lt;/<span class="hljs-name">span</span>&gt;</span>)

        model_input = ModelInput.from_ints(token_ids)
        prompt_lps = <span class="hljs-tag">&lt;<span class="hljs-name">span</span> <span class="hljs-attr">class</span>=<span class="hljs-string">"hljs-keyword"</span>&gt;</span>await<span class="hljs-tag">&lt;/<span class="hljs-name">span</span>&gt;</span> trainer.current_sampling_client.compute_logprobs_async(model_input)

        token_logprobs = []
        <span class="hljs-tag">&lt;<span class="hljs-name">span</span> <span class="hljs-attr">class</span>=<span class="hljs-string">"hljs-keyword"</span>&gt;</span>for<span class="hljs-tag">&lt;/<span class="hljs-name">span</span>&gt;</span> i, token_id <span class="hljs-tag">&lt;<span class="hljs-name">span</span> <span class="hljs-attr">class</span>=<span class="hljs-string">"hljs-keyword"</span>&gt;</span>in<span class="hljs-tag">&lt;/<span class="hljs-name">span</span>&gt;</span> enumerate(token_ids):
            lp = prompt_lps[i] <span class="hljs-tag">&lt;<span class="hljs-name">span</span> <span class="hljs-attr">class</span>=<span class="hljs-string">"hljs-keyword"</span>&gt;</span>if<span class="hljs-tag">&lt;/<span class="hljs-name">span</span>&gt;</span> i <span class="hljs-symbol">&amp;lt;</span> len(prompt_lps) <span class="hljs-tag">&lt;<span class="hljs-name">span</span> <span class="hljs-attr">class</span>=<span class="hljs-string">"hljs-keyword"</span>&gt;</span>and<span class="hljs-tag">&lt;/<span class="hljs-name">span</span>&gt;</span> prompt_lps[i] <span class="hljs-tag">&lt;<span class="hljs-name">span</span> <span class="hljs-attr">class</span>=<span class="hljs-string">"hljs-keyword"</span>&gt;</span>is<span class="hljs-tag">&lt;/<span class="hljs-name">span</span>&gt;</span> <span class="hljs-tag">&lt;<span class="hljs-name">span</span> <span class="hljs-attr">class</span>=<span class="hljs-string">"hljs-keyword"</span>&gt;</span>not<span class="hljs-tag">&lt;/<span class="hljs-name">span</span>&gt;</span> <span class="hljs-tag">&lt;<span class="hljs-name">span</span> <span class="hljs-attr">class</span>=<span class="hljs-string">"hljs-literal"</span>&gt;</span>None<span class="hljs-tag">&lt;/<span class="hljs-name">span</span>&gt;</span> <span class="hljs-tag">&lt;<span class="hljs-name">span</span> <span class="hljs-attr">class</span>=<span class="hljs-string">"hljs-keyword"</span>&gt;</span>else<span class="hljs-tag">&lt;/<span class="hljs-name">span</span>&gt;</span> <span class="hljs-tag">&lt;<span class="hljs-name">span</span> <span class="hljs-attr">class</span>=<span class="hljs-string">"hljs-number"</span>&gt;</span>0.0<span class="hljs-tag">&lt;/<span class="hljs-name">span</span>&gt;</span>

            token_text = <span class="hljs-tag">&lt;<span class="hljs-name">span</span> <span class="hljs-attr">class</span>=<span class="hljs-string">"hljs-literal"</span>&gt;</span>None<span class="hljs-tag">&lt;/<span class="hljs-name">span</span>&gt;</span>
            <span class="hljs-tag">&lt;<span class="hljs-name">span</span> <span class="hljs-attr">class</span>=<span class="hljs-string">"hljs-keyword"</span>&gt;</span>if<span class="hljs-tag">&lt;/<span class="hljs-name">span</span>&gt;</span> request.return_text:
                token_text = trainer.tokenizer.decode([token_id])

            token_logprobs.append(
                TokenLogprob(
                    token_id=token_id,
                    logprob=lp,
                    token=token_text,
                )
            )

        <span class="hljs-tag">&lt;<span class="hljs-name">span</span> <span class="hljs-attr">class</span>=<span class="hljs-string">"hljs-keyword"</span>&gt;</span>return<span class="hljs-tag">&lt;/<span class="hljs-name">span</span>&gt;</span> LogprobsResponse(
            logprobs=token_logprobs,
            num_tokens=len(token_ids),
        )

    <span class="hljs-tag">&lt;<span class="hljs-name">span</span> <span class="hljs-attr">class</span>=<span class="hljs-string">"hljs-keyword"</span>&gt;</span>except<span class="hljs-tag">&lt;/<span class="hljs-name">span</span>&gt;</span> HTTPException:
        <span class="hljs-tag">&lt;<span class="hljs-name">span</span> <span class="hljs-attr">class</span>=<span class="hljs-string">"hljs-keyword"</span>&gt;</span>raise<span class="hljs-tag">&lt;/<span class="hljs-name">span</span>&gt;</span>
    <span class="hljs-tag">&lt;<span class="hljs-name">span</span> <span class="hljs-attr">class</span>=<span class="hljs-string">"hljs-keyword"</span>&gt;</span>except<span class="hljs-tag">&lt;/<span class="hljs-name">span</span>&gt;</span> Exception <span class="hljs-tag">&lt;<span class="hljs-name">span</span> <span class="hljs-attr">class</span>=<span class="hljs-string">"hljs-keyword"</span>&gt;</span>as<span class="hljs-tag">&lt;/<span class="hljs-name">span</span>&gt;</span> e:
        <span class="hljs-tag">&lt;<span class="hljs-name">span</span> <span class="hljs-attr">class</span>=<span class="hljs-string">"hljs-keyword"</span>&gt;</span>raise<span class="hljs-tag">&lt;/<span class="hljs-name">span</span>&gt;</span> HTTPException(status_code=<span class="hljs-tag">&lt;<span class="hljs-name">span</span> <span class="hljs-attr">class</span>=<span class="hljs-string">"hljs-number"</span>&gt;</span>500<span class="hljs-tag">&lt;/<span class="hljs-name">span</span>&gt;</span>, detail=<span class="hljs-tag">&lt;<span class="hljs-name">span</span> <span class="hljs-attr">class</span>=<span class="hljs-string">"hljs-string"</span>&gt;</span>f"Logprobs computation failed: <span class="hljs-tag">&lt;<span class="hljs-name">span</span> <span class="hljs-attr">class</span>=<span class="hljs-string">"hljs-subst"</span>&gt;</span>{str(e)}<span class="hljs-tag">&lt;/<span class="hljs-name">span</span>&gt;</span>"<span class="hljs-tag">&lt;/<span class="hljs-name">span</span>&gt;</span>)


<span class="hljs-tag">&lt;<span class="hljs-name">span</span> <span class="hljs-attr">class</span>=<span class="hljs-string">"hljs-function"</span>&gt;</span><span class="hljs-tag">&lt;<span class="hljs-name">span</span> <span class="hljs-attr">class</span>=<span class="hljs-string">"hljs-keyword"</span>&gt;</span>def<span class="hljs-tag">&lt;/<span class="hljs-name">span</span>&gt;</span> <span class="hljs-tag">&lt;<span class="hljs-name">span</span> <span class="hljs-attr">class</span>=<span class="hljs-string">"hljs-title"</span>&gt;</span>run_fastapi_server<span class="hljs-tag">&lt;/<span class="hljs-name">span</span>&gt;</span><span class="hljs-tag">&lt;<span class="hljs-name">span</span> <span class="hljs-attr">class</span>=<span class="hljs-string">"hljs-params"</span>&gt;</span>(port=<span class="hljs-tag">&lt;<span class="hljs-name">span</span> <span class="hljs-attr">class</span>=<span class="hljs-string">"hljs-number"</span>&gt;</span>8001<span class="hljs-tag">&lt;/<span class="hljs-name">span</span>&gt;</span>)<span class="hljs-tag">&lt;/<span class="hljs-name">span</span>&gt;</span>:<span class="hljs-tag">&lt;/<span class="hljs-name">span</span>&gt;</span>
    <span class="hljs-tag">&lt;<span class="hljs-name">span</span> <span class="hljs-attr">class</span>=<span class="hljs-string">"hljs-string"</span>&gt;</span>"""Run FastAPI server in background thread."""<span class="hljs-tag">&lt;/<span class="hljs-name">span</span>&gt;</span>
    <span class="hljs-tag">&lt;<span class="hljs-name">span</span> <span class="hljs-attr">class</span>=<span class="hljs-string">"hljs-keyword"</span>&gt;</span>import<span class="hljs-tag">&lt;/<span class="hljs-name">span</span>&gt;</span> uvicorn

    uvicorn.run(app, host=<span class="hljs-tag">&lt;<span class="hljs-name">span</span> <span class="hljs-attr">class</span>=<span class="hljs-string">"hljs-string"</span>&gt;</span>"0.0.0.0"<span class="hljs-tag">&lt;/<span class="hljs-name">span</span>&gt;</span>, port=port, log_level=<span class="hljs-tag">&lt;<span class="hljs-name">span</span> <span class="hljs-attr">class</span>=<span class="hljs-string">"hljs-string"</span>&gt;</span>"info"<span class="hljs-tag">&lt;/<span class="hljs-name">span</span>&gt;</span>)


<span class="hljs-tag">&lt;<span class="hljs-name">span</span> <span class="hljs-attr">class</span>=<span class="hljs-string">"hljs-keyword"</span>&gt;</span>async<span class="hljs-tag">&lt;/<span class="hljs-name">span</span>&gt;</span> <span class="hljs-tag">&lt;<span class="hljs-name">span</span> <span class="hljs-attr">class</span>=<span class="hljs-string">"hljs-function"</span>&gt;</span><span class="hljs-tag">&lt;<span class="hljs-name">span</span> <span class="hljs-attr">class</span>=<span class="hljs-string">"hljs-keyword"</span>&gt;</span>def<span class="hljs-tag">&lt;/<span class="hljs-name">span</span>&gt;</span> <span class="hljs-tag">&lt;<span class="hljs-name">span</span> <span class="hljs-attr">class</span>=<span class="hljs-string">"hljs-title"</span>&gt;</span>main<span class="hljs-tag">&lt;/<span class="hljs-name">span</span>&gt;</span><span class="hljs-tag">&lt;<span class="hljs-name">span</span> <span class="hljs-attr">class</span>=<span class="hljs-string">"hljs-params"</span>&gt;</span>()<span class="hljs-tag">&lt;/<span class="hljs-name">span</span>&gt;</span>:<span class="hljs-tag">&lt;/<span class="hljs-name">span</span>&gt;</span>
    <span class="hljs-tag">&lt;<span class="hljs-name">span</span> <span class="hljs-attr">class</span>=<span class="hljs-string">"hljs-keyword"</span>&gt;</span>global<span class="hljs-tag">&lt;/<span class="hljs-name">span</span>&gt;</span> trainer

    config = TinkerAtroposConfig(
        lora_rank=int(os.getenv(<span class="hljs-tag">&lt;<span class="hljs-name">span</span> <span class="hljs-attr">class</span>=<span class="hljs-string">"hljs-string"</span>&gt;</span>"LORA_RANK"<span class="hljs-tag">&lt;/<span class="hljs-name">span</span>&gt;</span>, <span class="hljs-tag">&lt;<span class="hljs-name">span</span> <span class="hljs-attr">class</span>=<span class="hljs-string">"hljs-string"</span>&gt;</span>"32"<span class="hljs-tag">&lt;/<span class="hljs-name">span</span>&gt;</span>)),
        learning_rate=float(os.getenv(<span class="hljs-tag">&lt;<span class="hljs-name">span</span> <span class="hljs-attr">class</span>=<span class="hljs-string">"hljs-string"</span>&gt;</span>"LEARNING_RATE"<span class="hljs-tag">&lt;/<span class="hljs-name">span</span>&gt;</span>, <span class="hljs-tag">&lt;<span class="hljs-name">span</span> <span class="hljs-attr">class</span>=<span class="hljs-string">"hljs-string"</span>&gt;</span>"4e-5"<span class="hljs-tag">&lt;/<span class="hljs-name">span</span>&gt;</span>)),
        num_steps=<span class="hljs-tag">&lt;<span class="hljs-name">span</span> <span class="hljs-attr">class</span>=<span class="hljs-string">"hljs-number"</span>&gt;</span>50<span class="hljs-tag">&lt;/<span class="hljs-name">span</span>&gt;</span>,
    )

    print(<span class="hljs-tag">&lt;<span class="hljs-name">span</span> <span class="hljs-attr">class</span>=<span class="hljs-string">"hljs-string"</span>&gt;</span>f"Using wandb run: <span class="hljs-tag">&lt;<span class="hljs-name">span</span> <span class="hljs-attr">class</span>=<span class="hljs-string">"hljs-subst"</span>&gt;</span>{config.wandb_run_name}<span class="hljs-tag">&lt;/<span class="hljs-name">span</span>&gt;</span>"<span class="hljs-tag">&lt;/<span class="hljs-name">span</span>&gt;</span>)

    trainer = TinkerAtroposTrainer(config)

<span class="hljs-tag">&lt;/<span class="hljs-name">pre</span>&gt;</span>
        <span class="hljs-tag">&lt;/<span class="hljs-name">td</span>&gt;</span>
      <span class="hljs-tag">&lt;/<span class="hljs-name">tr</span>&gt;</span>
    
      <span class="hljs-tag">&lt;<span class="hljs-name">tr</span>&gt;</span>
        <span class="hljs-tag">&lt;<span class="hljs-name">td</span> <span class="hljs-attr">class</span>=<span class="hljs-string">"docs"</span>&gt;</span>
          <span class="hljs-tag">&lt;<span class="hljs-name">div</span> <span class="hljs-attr">class</span>=<span class="hljs-string">"pilwrap"</span>&gt;</span>
  <span class="hljs-tag">&lt;<span class="hljs-name">a</span> <span class="hljs-attr">class</span>=<span class="hljs-string">"pilcrow"</span> <span class="hljs-attr">href</span>=<span class="hljs-string">"#section-44"</span> <span class="hljs-attr">id</span>=<span class="hljs-string">"section-44"</span>&gt;</span><span class="hljs-tag">&lt;/<span class="hljs-name">a</span>&gt;</span>
<span class="hljs-tag">&lt;/<span class="hljs-name">div</span>&gt;</span>
<span class="hljs-tag">&lt;<span class="hljs-name">p</span>&gt;</span>Start FastAPI server in background thread for Atropos to call<span class="hljs-tag">&lt;/<span class="hljs-name">p</span>&gt;</span>

        <span class="hljs-tag">&lt;/<span class="hljs-name">td</span>&gt;</span>
        <span class="hljs-tag">&lt;<span class="hljs-name">td</span> <span class="hljs-attr">class</span>=<span class="hljs-string">"code highlight"</span>&gt;</span>
          <span class="hljs-tag">&lt;<span class="hljs-name">pre</span> <span class="hljs-attr">class</span>=<span class="hljs-string">"python"</span>&gt;</span>    <span class="hljs-tag">&lt;<span class="hljs-name">span</span> <span class="hljs-attr">class</span>=<span class="hljs-string">"hljs-keyword"</span>&gt;</span>import<span class="hljs-tag">&lt;/<span class="hljs-name">span</span>&gt;</span> threading

    server_thread = threading.Thread(target=run_fastapi_server, args=(<span class="hljs-tag">&lt;<span class="hljs-name">span</span> <span class="hljs-attr">class</span>=<span class="hljs-string">"hljs-number"</span>&gt;</span>8001<span class="hljs-tag">&lt;/<span class="hljs-name">span</span>&gt;</span>,), daemon=<span class="hljs-tag">&lt;<span class="hljs-name">span</span> <span class="hljs-attr">class</span>=<span class="hljs-string">"hljs-literal"</span>&gt;</span>True<span class="hljs-tag">&lt;/<span class="hljs-name">span</span>&gt;</span>)
    server_thread.start()

    print(<span class="hljs-tag">&lt;<span class="hljs-name">span</span> <span class="hljs-attr">class</span>=<span class="hljs-string">"hljs-string"</span>&gt;</span>"Waiting for FastAPI server to start..."<span class="hljs-tag">&lt;/<span class="hljs-name">span</span>&gt;</span>)
    <span class="hljs-tag">&lt;<span class="hljs-name">span</span> <span class="hljs-attr">class</span>=<span class="hljs-string">"hljs-keyword"</span>&gt;</span>await<span class="hljs-tag">&lt;/<span class="hljs-name">span</span>&gt;</span> asyncio.sleep(<span class="hljs-tag">&lt;<span class="hljs-name">span</span> <span class="hljs-attr">class</span>=<span class="hljs-string">"hljs-number"</span>&gt;</span>3<span class="hljs-tag">&lt;/<span class="hljs-name">span</span>&gt;</span>)

    <span class="hljs-tag">&lt;<span class="hljs-name">span</span> <span class="hljs-attr">class</span>=<span class="hljs-string">"hljs-keyword"</span>&gt;</span>await<span class="hljs-tag">&lt;/<span class="hljs-name">span</span>&gt;</span> trainer.run()


<span class="hljs-tag">&lt;<span class="hljs-name">span</span> <span class="hljs-attr">class</span>=<span class="hljs-string">"hljs-keyword"</span>&gt;</span>if<span class="hljs-tag">&lt;/<span class="hljs-name">span</span>&gt;</span> __name__ == <span class="hljs-tag">&lt;<span class="hljs-name">span</span> <span class="hljs-attr">class</span>=<span class="hljs-string">"hljs-string"</span>&gt;</span>"__main__"<span class="hljs-tag">&lt;/<span class="hljs-name">span</span>&gt;</span>:
    asyncio.run(main())

<span class="hljs-tag">&lt;/<span class="hljs-name">pre</span>&gt;</span>
        <span class="hljs-tag">&lt;/<span class="hljs-name">td</span>&gt;</span>
      <span class="hljs-tag">&lt;/<span class="hljs-name">tr</span>&gt;</span>
    
  <span class="hljs-tag">&lt;/<span class="hljs-name">tbody</span>&gt;</span>
<span class="hljs-tag">&lt;/<span class="hljs-name">table</span>&gt;</span>

  <span class="hljs-tag">&lt;/<span class="hljs-name">div</span>&gt;</span>
<span class="hljs-tag">&lt;/<span class="hljs-name">body</span>&gt;</span>
<span class="hljs-tag">&lt;/<span class="hljs-name">html</span>&gt;</span>

</pre>
        </td>
      </tr>
    
  </tbody>
</table>

  </div>
</body>
</html>
